Flex at the hips and knees until your hips land back on the bench, then kick your legs back out to the starting position.

name: Eccentric Dragonflag
steps: Perform a reverse crunch and then kick your legs up toward the ceiling.
With your hips and knees extended, lower yourself slowly back to the start position.

name: Dumbbell Incline Curl
steps: Hold the dumbbells with an underhand grip. Seated on an incline bench.
Slowly lift the dumbbell up to chest height
Return to starting position and repeat.

name: Laying Alternating Leg Raise
steps: Lie on your back, arms by sides, legs straight.
Lift one leg to a 45-degree angle.
Lower leg, lift opposite leg; alternate smoothly.

name: Laying Bent Leg Raise
steps: Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat on the floor.
Raise both knees towards your chest.
Lower back down without touching the floor; repeat for desired reps.

name: Alternating Bent Leg Raise
steps: Lie on your back, legs bent and lifted off the ground.
Lower one leg to the ground until your foot taps the ground, keep your other leg up.
Alternate sides for the prescribed amount of reps.

name: Scissor Kick
steps: Lie on your back, hands under your buttocks or on the ground for support.
Lift legs off the ground, alternate crossing them in a scissor motion.

name: Sideways Scissor Kick
steps: Lift both legs off the ground.
Bring both legs outward, then cross both legs over one another.
Alternating which leg goes on top.

name: Windshield Wiper
steps: Lie on back, arms out, legs together.
Lift legs to 90 degrees.
Rotate legs side to side, keeping shoulders grounded.

name: Reach And Catch
steps: Lay flat on your back with both hands over one leg.
Reach toward your knee flexing your abs and obliques.
Do the prescribed amount of reps, then switch sides.

name: Oblique Crunch
steps: Lie on your side, knees bent, hands behind head.
Bring your elbow towards your knees and flex your obliques.

name: Oblique Jackknife
steps: Lie on your side, legs straight, hand behind head.
Lift both legs and upper body simultaneously.
Squeeze obliques, then lower back down. Repeat on both sides.

name: Frog Crunch
steps: Lie on your back, knees bent, hands behind head.
Crunch up, flexing the spine and your abs.

name: Frog Sit Up
steps: Lay on your back with knees bent and your feet together.
Keep your arms extended overhead. Swing your arms to generate some momentum and sit up.

name: Elbow Plank Mountain Climber
steps: Begin in an elbow plank position with your core engaged.
Bring your right knee towards your right elbow.
Return to plank, then switch legs quickly. Repeat.

name: Slow Tempo Mountain Climber
steps: To perform a bodyweight mountain climber, start in a plank position with your hands placed directly under your shoulders.
Bring your right knee towards your chest, keeping your foot close to your hand. Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee towards your chest.
Continue this movement, alternating legs, at a slow pace for a set amount of time or repetitions.

name: Switch Jump Mountain Climber
steps: Start in a plank position with hands under shoulders.
Jump one foot forward, switch legs mid-air.
Alternate legs quickly, maintaining a steady plank.

name: Slalom Mountain Climber
steps: Start in a plank position with hands directly under shoulders.
Drive knees toward left elbow.
Go back to starting position, then drive knees to right elbow, mimicking a zigzag slalom motion.

name: Jumping Mountain Climber
steps: Begin in a plank position, hands under shoulders, feet together.
Jump feet forward, landing outside hands in a low squat.
Explode back to plank, repeat continuously for desired reps.

name: Ring Standing Pushup
steps: Start by setting up the rings to a secure anchor point and adjust the straps so that they hang about waist height when you stand under them.
Stand facing the rings grab the handles with both hands, and step forward so that your body is in a plank position with your hands directly beneath your shoulders.
Lower your body down by bending your elbows until your chest nearly touches the handles. Keep your core tight and your body in a straight line.
Push your body back up to the starting position, straightening your arms as you do so. Make sure to engage your chest, triceps, and core throughout the movement.

name: Ring Row
steps: Set up rings at a high point.
Grip rings and lean back, arms extended.
Pull chest to rings, keeping body straight.

name: Ring Standing Archer Pushup
steps: Position rings shoulder-width apart, grasp handles, extend legs behind.
Lower chest to rings, bend one elbow, while extending your other arm out to the side. Push yourself back to the start.
Then switch arms and repeat.

name: Ring Standing Chest Fly
steps: Start by adjusting the rings straps to chest height. Stand facing the rings with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rings' handles with both hands, keeping your arms extended and your shoulders away from your ears.
Lean forward, keeping your arms extended and your core engaged. Your body should form a slight diagonal line from your ankles to your head.
Slowly bring your arms towards each other, in front of your chest, while keeping your core engaged and your body in a stable position.

name: Ring Rear Delt Fly
steps: Stand facing rings and grab the handles.
Step forward so that your body is in a plank position, with your arms straight and your body in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Keeping your arms straight, slowly lift your arms out to the side, keeping them at the same height as your shoulders. Your body should form a "T" shape.

name: Ring Skullcrusher
steps: Attach the ring straps to a high point. Stand on your tip toes.
Your arms should be extended in front of you.
Break at the elbows until your forearms touch your biceps. Then extend your elbows back to the start.

name: Ring Standing Roll Out
steps: Grasp the rings, keeping your arms extended and your shoulders away from your ears.
Keep your abs engaged, roll forward onto your toes, and extend your arms in front of you.
Slowly lower your body down toward the ground, keeping your arms straight and your abs engaged.
When your head gets between your arms, pause for a moment and then use your abs to pull your body back up to the starting position.

name: Ring Curl
steps: Stand holding gymnastic rings with your arms extended in front of you, palms facing up.
Curl rings towards shoulders, squeezing biceps.
Slowly lower rings back to starting position, keeping control. Repeat.

name: Bodyweight Assisted Pull Up
steps: Grasp the chin-up bar with an overhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Place your feet on the ground, legs bent slightly.
Use your legs to assist as you pull your chin above the bar.

name: Bodyweight Assisted Chin Up
steps: Grasp the chin-up bar with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Place your feet on the ground, legs bent slightly.
Use your legs to assist as you pull your chin above the bar.

name: Bodyweight Assisted Gironda Chin Up
steps: Grasp the chin-up bar with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Place your feet on the ground, legs bent slightly.
Use your legs to assist as you pull your chest to the bar.

name: Bodyweight Assisted Mixed Grip Pullup
steps: Grasp the chin-up bar with a mixed grip, shoulder-width apart.
Place your feet on the ground, legs bent slightly.
Use your legs to assist as you pull your chin above the bar.

name: Bodyweight Hanging L Sit
steps: Grip bar, hang with arms extended, body straight.
Engage core, lift knees towards chest.
Hold that position for the specified amount of time.

name: Bodyweight Hanging Knee Tuck
steps: Grip bar, hang with arms extended, body straight.
Engage core, lift knees towards chest.
Lower legs back down, maintain controlled movement.

name: Bodyweight Underhand Inverted Row
steps: Lay underneath a fixed horizontal bar and grab the bar with an underhand grip.
Pull your body straight up to the bar.
Return to the starting position, your arms fully extended. Repeat.

name: Bodyweight Overhand Inverted Row
steps: Lay underneath a fixed horizontal bar and grab the bar with a wide overhand grip.
Pull your body straight up to the bar.
Return to the starting position, your arms fully extended. Repeat.

name: Bodyweight Standing Inverted Row
steps: Grab a door frame or a rack and place your feet near the frame.
Start with your elbows extended, row your body towards your hands.
Return to the starting position, your arms fully extended. Repeat.

name: Bodyweight Concentration Curl
steps: Place your elbow on one knee and your hand underneath the other leg. Keep the leg that's over your hand extended.
Curl the working arm and use your leg as the resistance.

name: Bodyweight Inverted Curl
steps: Hang from a bar with your feet on the floor.
Break at the elbows and curl your body towards the bar.

name: Bodyweight Close Grip Inverted Curl
steps: Grab the bar with a close grip. Feet on the floor.
Break at the elbow and curl your body toward the bar.

name: Stationary Bike
steps: Hold the handles and maintain a neutral spine.
Pedal at a moderate pace and try to minimise rocking back and forth.

name: Bodyweight Butterfly Stretch
steps: Sit on your butt with your knees bent and feet touching each other.
Grab your feet and lean forward until you feel a stretch in your groin.

name: Bodyweight Ninety Ninety Hip Stretch
steps: Sit with one leg in front of you flat on the ground.
While the other leg is to your side, also flat on the ground with your foot pointed backwards.
Hold this position for the prescribed amount of time then change sides.

name: Bodyweight Thoracic Spine Rotation
steps: Start on all fours then bring your chest to the ground. Place one hand on the ground in front of you. The other hand behind your head/ear.
On the side of the hand that is behind your head, rotate until your elbow is pointed at the ceiling and then hold this position.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Balance Stable
steps: Hold on to something stable and pull the leg on the opposing side straight up. Hold this position.

name: Kettlebell Incline Guillotine Bench Press
steps: Lie on bench, hold kettlebell with both hands over chest.
Lower kettlebells, elbows flared.
Press kettlebells upward, fully extending arms. Repeat.

name: Kettlebell Swing Lunge
steps: Stand with your feet shoulder-width. Kettlebell at your side.
Step forward with your right foot and bend both knees to lower your body until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push off your right foot to return to the starting position.
Step back with the same leg until the back knee taps the floor.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Curtsy Lunge
steps: Hold a kettlebell at your chest, feet hip-width apart.
Step one leg diagonally back into a lunge.
Alternate legs, keeping your chest up and core engaged.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Lateral Lunge
steps: Hold one kettlebell with one or both hands, feet hip-width apart.
Step out to one side, bending the knee.
Push off, return to center, then switch sides.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Reverse Lunge
steps: Hold two kettlebells by your side.
Take a big step backwards with your left leg, lowering your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground and your right knee is bent at a 90-degree angle.
Push back up and switch legs, alternating each rep.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Forward Lunge
steps: Stand tall, holding kettlebells by your sides, feet hip-width apart.
Step forward with one leg, lowering until both knees form 90° angles.
Push through front foot, return to start, and switch legs.

name: Dumbbell Swing Lunge
steps: Stand with your feet shoulder-width. Dumbbells at your side.
Step forward with your right foot and bend both knees to lower your body until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push off your right foot to return to the starting position.
Step back with the same leg until the back knee taps the floor.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Alternating Curtsy Lunge
steps: Hold a dumbbell at your chest, feet hip-width apart.
Step one leg diagonally back into a lunge.
Alternate legs, keeping your chest up and core engaged.

name: Dumbbell Alternating Lateral Lunge
steps: Hold one dumbbell with one or both hands, feet hip-width apart.
Step out to one side, bending the knee.
Push off, return to center, then switch sides.

name: Dumbbell Alternating Reverse Lunge
steps: Hold two dumbbells by your side.
Take a big step backwards with your left leg, lowering your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground and your right knee is bent at a 90-degree angle.
Push back up and switch legs, alternating each rep.

name: Dumbbell Alternating Forward Lunge
steps: Stand tall, holding dumbbells by your sides, feet hip-width apart.
Step forward with one leg, lowering until both knees form 90° angles.
Push through front foot, return to start, and switch legs.

name: Weighted Plank Up Down
steps: Start from a plank position. Place a plate on your back.
Go to one elbow then the other. Try to avoid rocking back and forth.

name: Bodyweight Hands Up Push Ups
steps: Place your hands firmly on the ground, directly under shoulders.
Flatten your back so your entire body is straight and slowly lower your body
Draw shoulder blades back and down, keeping elbows tucked close to your body. Bring chest all the way to the floor and raise hands off the ground.
Exhale as you push back to the starting position.

name: Weighted Push Ups
steps: Place your hands firmly on the ground, directly under shoulders. Place a plate on your back.
Flatten your back so your entire body is straight and slowly lower your body
Draw shoulder blades back and down, keeping elbows tucked close to your body
Exhale as you push back to the starting position.

name: Weighted Diamond Push Ups
steps: Place a plate on your back. Position your index fingers and thumbs so they are touching, forming a diamond shape.
Use a standard push up position
Lower your chest towards your hands, keep your elbows close to your body
Stop just before your chest touches the floor, then push back up to the starting position.

name: Weighted Knee Push Ups
steps: Begin in a push-up position on your knees. Break at the elbow and shoulder joint.
Lower your body, keeping elbows close.
Push back up to the starting position.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Squat
steps: Stand on one leg, extend the other forward for balance.
Lower into a squat, keeping your chest up and core tight.
Press through your heel to stand back up, repeat.

name: Bodyweight Plank Jack
steps: Start in a plank position, hands under shoulders, body straight.
Jump feet wide, then back together, like a jumping jack.
Keep core tight, maintain plank form, repeat for desired time or reps.

name: Bodyweight Plank Arm Lift
steps: Start in a plank position.
Raise your arm out in front of you.
Return to the starting position, then raise the opposing arm.
Make sure to keep your hips stable. If you're unable to, try performing this exercise from the knees.

name: Inchworm
steps: Stand tall, hinge at hips, and reach hands to the floor.
Walk hands forward into a plank position.
Walk feet towards hands and repeat the motion.

name: Weighted Wall Sit
steps: Press your back against a wall, feet shoulder-width apart, holding weights at your sides.
Lower into a squat position, thighs parallel to the floor, knees above ankles.
Hold the position, maintaining tension in your core and legs.

name: Wall Sit
steps: Press your back against a wall, feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower into a squat position, thighs parallel to the floor, knees above ankles.
Hold the position, maintaining tension in your core and legs.

name: Jump Rope
steps: Hold handles, elbows close, and jump with both feet together.
Rotate wrists to swing the rope over your head.
Jump as it reaches your feet, keeping a steady rhythm.

name: Wall Angels
steps: Stand against a wall with your back flat, arms at 90° by your sides.
Slowly raise arms overhead, keeping elbows and wrists in contact with the wall.
Lower arms back down to starting position, maintaining constant wall contact throughout.

name: Butt Kick
steps: Stand tall, jog in place, bringing heels toward your glutes.
Keep your core tight and swing arms naturally.
Alternate legs quickly, maintaining a steady rhythm.

name: Ankle Circle
steps: Sit or stand, lift one foot slightly off the ground.
Rotate your ankle in a circular motion.
Complete the allotted amount of reps, then switch directions and repeat on the other foot.

name: Kettlebell Assisted Bulgarian Split Squat
steps: Grab a stick of some sort or hold onto something stable (rack, bench).
Grab a box that is knee height or slightly lower.
Hold the stick in your right arm, kettlebell in the other and put your right leg on the box.
Begin your squat by breaking at the knees. Get your knee close to the floor or all the way to the floor. Make sure to keep your chest tall.

name: Dumbbell Assisted Bulgarian Split Squat
steps: Grab a stick of some sort or hold onto something stable (rack, bench).
Grab a box that is knee height or slightly lower.
Hold the stick in your right arm, dumbbell in the other and put your right leg on the box.
Begin your squat by breaking at the knees. Get your knee close to the floor or all the way to the floor. Make sure to keep your chest tall.

name: Plate Weighted Inverted Row
steps: Lay underneath a fixed horizontal bar and grab the bar with a wide overhand grip. Place a plate on your chest.
Pull your body straight up to the bar.
Return to the starting position, your arms fully extended. Repeat.

name: Dumbbell Weighted Pull Ups
steps: Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, arms and shoulders fully extended.
Pull your body up until your chin is above the bar.
Lower your body back to starting position.

name: Dumbbell Weighted Chin Ups
steps: Grab the bar shoulder width apart with a supinated grip (palms facing you). Use a dip belt and the let the weight hang between your legs.
With your body hanging and arms fully extended, pull yourself up until your chin is past the bar.
Slowly return to starting position. Repeat.

name: Weighted Pull Ups
steps: Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, arms and shoulders fully extended. Weight hanging between your legs.
Pull your body up until your chin is above the bar.
Lower your body back to starting position.

name: Weighted Chin Ups
steps: Grab the bar shoulder width apart with a supinated grip (palms facing you). Use a dip belt and the let the weight hang between your legs.
With your body hanging and arms fully extended, pull yourself up until your chin is past the bar.
Slowly return to starting position. Repeat.

name: Dumbbell Weighted Dip
steps: Use a dip belt to attach a dumbbell to yourself. Grip bars with arms straight, shoulders above hands. Keep legs straight or bent.
Lower slowly until elbows are at 90 degrees.
Push back up to start position, extending arms fully.

name: Plate Weighted Dip
steps: Use a dip belt to attach a plate to yourself. Grip bars with arms straight, shoulders above hands. Keep legs straight or bent.
Lower slowly until elbows are at 90 degrees.
Push back up to start position, extending arms fully.

name: Dumbbell Internal Rotation
steps: Lay flat on the ground with your elbow on the floor and dumbbell pointed toward the ceiling.
Lower the dumbbell until your knuckles get close to the ground. Then back to the starting position.

name: Dumbbell External Rotation
steps: Hold a dumbbell in one hand,  elbow bent at 90 degrees while resting on your inner thigh/ knee.
Rotate your arm outward, keeping your elbow stable.

name: Leg Raised Push Up
steps: Place your hands firmly on the ground, directly under shoulders.
Flatten your back so your entire body is straight, raise one leg off the ground,  and slowly lower your body
Draw shoulder blades back and down, keeping elbows tucked close to your body
Exhale as you push back to the starting position.

name: Kettlebell Kneeling Bottoms Up Overhead Press
steps: Start by taking a kneeling position and holding a kettlebell in each hand with the bottom of the kettlebell facing up.
Bring the kettlebells to your shoulders, with your palms facing forward and your elbows bent.
From this starting position, extend your arms upwards so that the kettlebells are overhead.
Make sure to keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the movement.

name: Dumbbell Half Kneeling Single Arm Overhead Press
steps: Take a half kneeling position while holding one dumbbell.
Drive the dumbbell upwards.

name: Dumbbell Half Kneeling Overhead Press
steps: Take a half kneeling position while holding two dumbbells.
Drive the dumbbells upwards.

name: Barbell Reverse Grip Bench Press
steps: Lay flat on the bench with your feet on the ground. With straight arms unrack the bar with a reverse grip.
Lower the bar to your lower chest
Raise the bar until you've locked your elbows.

name: Dumbbell Reverse Grip Bench Press
steps: Lay flat on the bench with your feet on the ground. With straight arms unrack the bar with a reverse grip.
Lower the dumbbells to your lower chest.
Raise the bar until you've locked your elbows.

name: Dumbbell Head On Bench Rear Delt Fly
steps: With dumbbells in either hand, bend your knees with your feet slightly bowed out. Arch your back above your knees, place your head on the top of an incline bench, and start with the weights touching in front of your chest.
With bent elbows, raise your arms up to shoulder level, pausing at the at the end of the motion.
Slowly lower your arms back to starting position.

name: Dumbbell Incline Front Raise
steps: Grab two dumbbells while sitting on an incline bench upright with the dumbbells at your side.
Raise the two dumbbells with your elbows being fully extended until the dumbbells are eye level.
Lower the weights in a controlled manner to the starting position and repeat.

name: Barbell Seated Full Front Raise
steps: Sit on an incline bench with an overhand grip on the barbell. Raise your arms until your fists are pointed toward the ceiling.
Return to the start under control. This exercise is prone to using momentum when you begin to fatigue.

name: Dumbbell Seated Single Arm Arnold Press
steps: Start by sitting on an incline bench and holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Bring the dumbbell to your shoulder, with your palm facing you and your elbow bent.
From this starting position, extend your arm upwards so that the dumbbell is directly above your head.
As you extend your arm, rotate your palm to face away from your body.

name: Dumbbell Seated Y Press
steps: Sit on an upright bench , grasp a pair of dumbbells and hold them at shoulder level with your palms facing each other. Keep your elbows bent and close to your body.
Press the dumbbells outward into a y shape.

name: Dumbbell Alternating Rear Delt Fly
steps: With dumbbells in either hand, bend your knees with your feet slightly bowed out. Arch your back above your knees, and start with the weights touching in front of your chest.
With bent elbows, raise your arms up to shoulder level, pausing at the at the end of the motion.
Slowly lower your arms back to starting position.

name: Band Upright Row
steps: Stand with one or both feet on one end of a band. Take a double overhand roughly shoulder width grip.
Pull your elbows straight up the ceiling. Aim to get the band to chin level or slightly higher.

name: Barbell Suitcase Carry
steps: Begin by standing with your feet hip-width apart with the bar on the ground at your side.
Lift the bar to your side and walk for the allotted amount of time or distance.
Set the bar down and switch sides.

name: Dumbbell Farmer Walk
steps: Grab a dumbbell in each hand, arms straight down.
Walk forward with a straight posture.

name: Barbell Sumo Pause Deadlift
steps: Set up for a sumo deadlift, grip the barbell.
Lift, pause at knee height.
Hold briefly, then complete the lift; reset and repeat for desired reps.

name: Dumbbell Y Press
steps: Stand tall, grasp a pair of dumbbells and hold them at shoulder level with your palms facing each other. Keep your elbows bent and close to your body.
Press the dumbbells outward into a y shape.

name: Dumbbell Cuban Press
steps: Perform an upright row until elbows are bent at 90 degrees and arms parallel to the ground.
Rotate your shoulders, raising the dumbbells overhead. Then press overhead.

name: Barbell Jefferson Deadlift
steps: Stand centered over the barbell, feet shoulder-width apart.
Grip the bar with both hands, one in front, one behind.
Lift by driving through your heels, keeping your back straight, then lower slowly.

name: Barbell Conventional Pause Deadlift
steps: Set up for a standard deadlift, grip the barbell.
Lift, pause at knee height.
Hold briefly, then complete the lift; reset and repeat for desired reps.

name: Barbell Block Conventional Deadlift
steps: Stand with your mid-foot under the bar, plates should be on blocks, and grip the bar with your hands, about a shoulder width apart.
Bend your knees, then lift the bar by straightening your back. It is important to keep your back straight.
Stand to your full height and hold.
Lower the bar to the floor by bending your knees and keeping your back straight.

name: Barbell Deficit Conventional Deadlift
steps: Stand with your mid-foot under the bar, feet should be on a plate or elevated platform, and grip the bar with your hands, about a shoulder width apart.
Bend your knees, then lift the bar by straightening your back. It is important to keep your back straight.
Stand to your full height and hold.
Lower the bar to the floor by bending your knees and keeping your back straight.

name: Barbell Bradford Press
steps: Hold a barbell at shoulder height with a pronated grip.
Press the barbell over your head.
Lower it behind your head, then return to the front. Repeat for desired reps.

name: Dumbbell Six Way Lateral Raise
steps: Perform a front raise, then bring dumbbells out to your side, then raise the dumbbells over head.

name: Dumbbell Full Lateral Raise
steps: Stand up straight with dumbbells at either side, palms facing your hips.
Raise your arms on either side with a slight bend in your elbow until they are over head. Pause at the top of the motion.
Slowly return your arms down to starting position.

name: Barbell Full Front Raise
steps: Stand tall with an overhand grip on the barbell. Raise your arms until your fists are pointed toward the ceiling.
Return to the start under control. This exercise is prone to using momentum when you begin to fatigue.

name: Dumbbell Full Front Raise
steps: Stand tall with an overhand grip on the dumbbell. Raise your arms until your fists are pointed toward the ceiling.
Return to the start under control. This exercise is prone to using momentum when you begin to fatigue.

name: Plate Weighted Dead Hang
steps: Attach weight to yourself using a dip belt. Grip a pull-up bar with palms facing forward.
Hang with arms fully extended.
Hold for recommended amount of time, keeping your core engaged.

name: L Sit Chin Up
steps: Grab the bar shoulder width apart with a supinated grip (palms facing you)
With your body in an "L" position and arms fully extended, pull yourself up until your chin is past the bar.
Slowly return to starting position. Repeat.

name: L Sit Pull Up
steps: Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, arms and shoulders fully extended. Pull your legs up until you're in an "L" position.
Pull your body up until your chin is above the bar.
Lower your body back to starting position.

name: Hanging L Sit
steps: Hang from a bar with arms fully extended.
Lift legs to form an "L" shape.
Hold for allotted amount of time keeping your abs flexed.

name: Dead Hang
steps: Grip a pull-up bar with palms facing forward.
Hang with arms fully extended.
Hold for recommended amount of time, keeping your core engaged.

name: Medicine Ball Dead Bug
steps: Lie on your back, place a medicine ball between your extended arms and bent knees.
Lower opposite arm and leg to floor, keeping back pressed against ground and medicine ball in place.
Alternate sides, maintain core engagement, and repeat for desired reps or time.

name: Band Standing Chest Press
steps: Loop the band around your back. The two end loops in each of your hands.
Extend your shoulder joint and elbow across your body until your arm is fully extended.

name: Band Tricep Kickback
steps: Anchor the band to a stable point.
Hinge forward. Extend and flex at the elbow.

name: Band Squat Hold Single Arm Row
steps: Anchor the band to a stable point and take a half squat position.
Hold the band loop in one hand and pull your elbow straight back.

name: Band Squat Hold Row
steps: Anchor the band to a stable point.
Take a half squat position and hold there.
Perform a row while holding the squat position.

name: Band Goblet Squat
steps: Stand with a shoulder width grip. Both feet should be on the band with the band looped over both hands.
Push your butt back and also break at the knees.
Try to hit parallel depth (bottom of your leg should be parallel with the ground). If you can't tell your squat depth, then try squatting in front of a mirror and watch your form.

name: Band Single Arm Pulldown
steps: Anchor the band to a high point. Go into a seated position.
Grab the loop of the band and pull your upper arm to your side.

name: Band Single Arm Row
steps: Anchor band to a stable point.
Step back until there is no slack in the band and hold the end of the band with one hand.
Pull through the elbow straight back.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Crunch
steps: Place your feet under the foot pads and grab the handles with your hands.
Flex your spine and bring your upper and lower body together.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Incline Chest Press
steps: Adjust the seat pad to match your height.
Press the weight forward until your elbows are nearly extended. Return to the starting position with out letting the weight rest at the bottom until finishing your set.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Decline Chest Press
steps: Adjust the seat pad to match your height.
Press the weight forward until your elbows are nearly extended. Return to the starting position with out letting the weight rest at the bottom until finishing your set.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Low Incline Bench Press
steps: Adjust the seat pad to match your height.
Press the weight forward until your elbows are nearly extended. Return to the starting position with out letting the weight rest at the bottom until finishing your set.

name: Machine Bent Arm Pec Fly
steps: Adjust seat height so handles align with chest. Put your elbows on the pads.
Slowly bring pads together in front, keeping tension. Focus on squeezing chest muscles.
Return pads to starting position with controlled motion. Keep chest up throughout. Repeat for reps.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Front Military Press
steps: Adjust seat to a comfortable height.
Load the pegs with an appropriate amount of weight.
Press the weight until your elbows are nearly extended, then lower the weight until just before the weight comes back to a rest.

name: Machine Chest Supported T Bar Row
steps: Lay on the chest pad and grab the handles. Lift the bar out of the holding hook.
Pull the bar to your chest and then fully extend your elbows at the bottom of each rep.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Pulldown
steps: Grip the handles with the palms facing down.
Sit on the machine and press your knees into the knee pad.
Pull the handles until your upper arm is even with your torso, or just behind your torso.
Extend until your elbows are fully extended before initiating the next rep.

name: Machine Rear Deltoid Row
steps: Place your chest against the pad and grab the handles with an overhand grip.
Pull your elbows straight back and keep your elbows flared throughout the rep.

name: Machine Pullover
steps: Adjust the seating pad for your height.
Place your elbows on the elbow pad. Pull the bar forward until it nearly touches your stomach.

name: Machine Seated Shrug
steps: Have a seat on the machine, and grab each handle.
Pull your shoulder blades straight up toward the ceiling.

name: Machine Standing Shrug
steps: Grab both handles and stand upright. Make sure you keep a flat back while lifting to the starting position.
Pull your shoulder blades straight up toward the ceiling.

name: Machine Back Extension
steps: Sit on the machine and place your upper back on the rolling pad.
Extend your hips and lower back. Make sure not to hyperextend your spine.

name: Machine Standing Lateral Raise
steps: Grab the two handles and raise the arms straight out to your sides.

name: Machine Standing Plate Loaded Preacher Curl
steps: Rest the back of your arms on the preacher bench.
Grab the handles. Curl the weight up until your elbows are fully flexed.
Lower until the point just before the weight rests at the bottom.

name: Machine Seated Plate Loaded Preacher Curl
steps: Sit at the bench and rest the back of your arms on the preacher bench.
Grab the handles. Curl the weight up until your elbows are fully flexed.
Lower until the point just before the weight rests at the bottom.

name: Machine Overhead Tricep Extension
steps: Adjust the pad to suit your height.
Grab the v bar (or other attachment) and extend your elbows until they are almost fully extended.
Flex your elbows and look to feel a stretch at the bottom of each rep.

name: Machine Reverse Hyperextension
steps: Lay on the pad and grab the handles.
Slip your legs into the belt loop.
Push your legs back until they are horizontal with the ground.
Lower back to the starting position.

name: Machine Pendulum Squat
steps: Position yourself in the pendulum squat machine with your back against the pad and shoulders under the shoulder pads.
Place feet shoulder-width apart on the platform. Keep your back straight, and slowly lower into a squat position.
Press through your heels to return to the starting position, keeping your core engaged. Repeat for desired reps and sets.

name: Machine Single Leg Leg Press
steps: This particular leg press has two separate foot plates. There are holding pins on both sides. Engage the pin on one side.
Lower the weight but stop before your lower back begins to round.
Press back to the starting position.

name: Machine Squat Press
steps: Place your legs on the platform with your feet at shoulder width.
Release the weight and extend your legs fully, without locking your knees.
Lower the weight until your legs are at a 90° angle (but DO NOT allow your butt and lower back to rise off of the pad. This will put your lower back in a rounded position, which is very dangerous.)
Raise the weight back to starting position.

name: Machine Donkey Calf Raise
steps: Adjust the machine to fit your height. Place your elbows on the pad, grab the handles. The vertical pad should be resting on your lower back.
Raise your heels toward the ceiling.

name: Machine 45 Degree Calf Raise
steps: Adjust the machine in accordance with your height and sit.
The balls of your feet should be supporting your weight on the calve block, your heels extended off of it.
Extend your heels upwards while keeping your knees stationary, and pause at the contracted position.
Slowly return to the starting position. Repeat.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Hip Thrust
steps: Adjust the machine for your height, sit with your back against the pad, knees bent, feet flat on the platform.
Brace your core, push through your heels, and extend your hips upwards, lifting the weight while squeezing your glutes.
Lower the weight slowly back to the starting position, ensuring controlled movement; repeat for desired reps and sets.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Low Row
steps: Press your chest into the chest pad and grab the horizontal handles with an overhand grip.
Pull the handles toward you, make sure your elbows stay flared out.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Seal Row
steps: Lay on the chest after adjusting the height off the bar holding hooks to match your arm length.
Remove the bar from the hooks, then initiate the set.
Pull the bar straight back, then lower to the start position. Fully extend your elbows at the bottom of each rep.
Lay on the chest after adjusting the height off the bar holding hooks to match your arm length.
Remove the bar from the hooks, then initiate the set.
Pull the bar straight back, then lower to the start position. Fully extend your elbows at the bottom of each rep.

name: Machine Plate Loaded T Bar Row
steps: Hinge forward while keeping your back flat.
Grab the handles and pull the weight toward your chest.
Make sure to fully extend your elbows at the bottom of each rep. Also make sure to not use momentum.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Row
steps: Sit on the machine, feet flat, and grab the handles.
Pull handles towards your lower abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Keep elbows close to your body.
Slowly return to the starting position, fully extending your arms without locking elbows. Repeat for desired reps.

name: Machine Bicep Curl
steps: Adjust the seat to fit your height and place your elbows on the elbow pad.
Grab the handles and flex your elbows.

name: Machine Tricep Pushdown
steps: Sit on the machine and place the back of your upper arm on the bench.
Extend your elbows until you feel a contraction in your triceps.
Bring the weight back to the starting position.

name: Machine Dips
steps: Sit on the machine and grab the handles.
Press the handles down until your elbows are nearly extended.

name: Machine Standing Hamstring Curl
steps: Press yourself into the pads and put your calves against the lower pads.
Flex your knee until you feel a contraction in your hamstring, then lower back to the start.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Kneeling Hamstring Curl
steps: Lay down on the machine, placing your working leg beneath the padded lever. Position your leg so that the padded lever is below your calve muscle.
Support yourself by grabbing the side handles of the machine, and slowly raise the weight with your legs.
Pause at the apex of the motion, then slowly return to starting position.

name: Horizontal Hack Squat
steps: Position yourself in the hack squat machine with your back against the pad and shoulders under the shoulder pads.
Place feet shoulder-width apart on the platform.
Press through your heels to the starting position, keeping your core engaged. Repeat for desired reps and sets.

name: Machine Crunch
steps: Place your feet under the foot pads and grab the handles with your hands.
Flex your spine and bring your upper and lower body together.

name: Machine Glute Kickback
steps: Grab the handles, place one knee on the pad, and the foot of the working leg on the foot plate.
Push your working leg back until you feel your glute contract, then return to the starting position without resting the weights.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Calf Raise
steps: Sit on the machine and press your back into the back pad.
Place the balls of your feet on the edge of the foot plate.
Let your heels lower until you feel a stretch in your calves, then press back up until you feel a contraction.

name: Gluteator
steps: Sit on the seat upright with your knees placed on the pads and your feet on the foot pads.
Push your legs outwards and backwards and flex your glutes.

name: Vertical Leg Press
steps: Lay on the pad and place your feet on the foot plate.
Lift the plate up and disengage the holding hook.
Lower the weight. Stop before your lower back rounds off the pad.
Press the weight back to the starting position.

name: Machine Belt Squat
steps: Put the belt around your waist and hook the end of the belt onto the machines.
Stand up to disengage the holding mechanism. Hold the arms while you squat.
Once you've completed your set, reset the holding mechanism.

name: Machine Plate Loaded Leg Extension
steps: Sit on the machine with your back against the cushion and adjust the machine you are using so that your knees are at a 90 degree angle at the starting position.
Raise the weight by extending your knees outward, then lower your leg to the starting position. Both movements should be done in a slow, controlled motion.

name: Machine Seated Hamstring Curl
steps: Adjust the back pad and ankle pad to suit your height.
Disengage the knee pad and lower it as far as you can.
Flex your knees against resistance, then extend until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

name: Dumbbell Laying Curl
steps: Hold the dumbbells with an underhand grip. Seated on a bench.
Start with the dumbbells pointed toward the ceiling, then lower the dumbbells toward your sides.
Fully extend your elbows, but don't let your upper arm fall behind your torso.

name: Elliptical
steps: Step onto the pedals, grip the handles, and start moving your feet in a natural stride.
Adjust resistance and incline for desired intensity while maintaining a steady, controlled motion.
Keep your posture upright, engage your core, and maintain a consistent pace for an effective workout.

name: Cable High Bayesian Curl
steps: Use a handle attachment. The cable should be set to about elbow height.
Face away from the cable machine.
Stagger your stance so you have a better base of support. Face your palm forward. Flex at the elbow and extend.

name: Cable Single Arm Overhead Tricep Extension
steps: Use a handle attachment. The cable should be set to your mid-back. Face away from the machine.
Point your elbows straight up toward the ceiling.
From there, extend your elbows until your fists are pointed straight toward the ceiling.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Press
steps: You can use any attachment. The cable should be even with your mid-back. Face away from the machine.
Point your elbows straight forward. Press the weight straight toward the ceiling.
As you return to the start, push your elbows forward. Try to touch your biceps to your forearms at the bottom of each rep.

name: Cable Internal Rotation
steps: Stand tall, hold the cable handle with a neutral grip, your elbow should be at a 90 degree angle.
Rotate your shoulder by bringing your forearm across your body.

name: Cable External Rotation
steps: Hold the cable handle in one hand,  elbow bent at 90 degrees going across your torso.
Rotate your arm outward, keeping your elbow stable.

name: Cable Kayak Row
steps: Use a bar attachment. Cable should be set all the way to the top of the machine.
Grab your attachment and walk a few steps back. Push your butt back to where you are leaning forward somewhat.
Initiate the movement with your shoulders and not your elbows. Bring one arm to your side.
You can either alternate sides or do one side at a time.

name: Cable Belt Calf Raise
steps: Put on a dip belt and attach the cable carabiner to the chain/strap.
Take a few steps back and stand tall. Raise up onto the balls of your feet and hold for a 1 count.

name: Cable Belt Split Squat
steps: Put on a dip belt and attach the strap/ chain to the cable's carabiner.
Take a few steps back and take a split stance.
Lower into a split squat, letting the weight pull you forward. As you squat back to the starting position push yourself backwards against the resistance.

name: Cable Belt Squat
steps: Put on a dip belt. Attach the strap/chain to the cable's carabiner.
Take a few steps back. Begin to squat by flexing at the knees and hips.
Let the weight pull you forward as you squat. Then push your toes through the front of your shoes as you squat back to the start position.

name: Barbell Muscle Snatch
steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, grip the barbell with a wide overhand grip, and keep your back straight and core engaged.
Lift the barbell by explosively extending your hips, knees, and ankles while keeping the bar close to your body.
As the bar reaches chest level, rotate your wrists and elbows up and back, transitioning into an overhead press.
Fully extend your arms overhead, stabilize the bar, then lower it back to the starting position with control.

name: Barbell High Pull
steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width, and keep your back straight.
Drive through your legs, extending your hips, knees, and ankles explosively while pulling the barbell upward.
As the bar rises, pull it close to your body, leading with your elbows until it reaches chest level.

name: Barbell Split Jerk
steps: Start with the barbell on your shoulders in a front rack position, feet hip-width apart. Slightly bend your knees and dip straight down.
Explosively extend your legs and push the barbell upward, generating momentum with your legs.
As the bar rises, quickly split your legs (one forward, one back) and drop under the bar, locking your arms overhead.
Bring your front foot back, then your back foot forward to a stable standing position with the bar locked overhead.

name: Barbell Power Snatch
steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, barbell over midfoot. Grip the bar wide (outside shoulders), hook grip recommended.
Keep chest up, back straight, and drive through heels to lift the bar off the ground, keeping it close to your body.
As the bar reaches mid-thigh, explode upwards by extending hips, knees, and ankles, shrugging shoulders and pulling the bar high.
Drop under the bar slightly, catching it overhead with arms locked out. Stand up fully to complete the lift.

name: Barbell Clean And Jerk
steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, grip the bar just outside your knees. Pull the bar from the floor by driving through your legs, keeping your back straight.
As the bar reaches your hips, extend explosively, shrug, and drop under to catch it in a front squat position with elbows high. Stand up tall.
Dip slightly, then drive through your legs to push the bar overhead.
Stabilize the bar overhead, lock arms, then bring feet together before lowering the bar safely.

name: Barbell Snatch
steps: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, barbell over midfoot. Grip the bar wide with an overhand grip, chest up, and back straight.
Lift the bar by driving through your legs, keeping it close to your body. Extend your hips and knees while maintaining a straight back.
Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles while shrugging your shoulders. Pull yourself under the bar as it moves upward.
Drop into a deep squat while locking the bar overhead. Stabilize, then stand up fully to complete the lift.

name: Barbell Snatch Grip High Pull
steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, gripping the barbell with a wide (snatch-width) grip. Keep your back straight, chest up, and bar close to your body.
Drive through your legs, extending your hips, knees, and ankles while pulling the barbell up explosively.
Shrug your shoulders forcefully and pull the bar as high as possible, keeping elbows above the bar.
Lower the bar back to the starting position in a controlled manner and reset for the next rep.

name: Kettlebell Front Rack Deficit Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, kettlebells in front rack position, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start.

name: Dumbbell Front Rack Deficit Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, dumbbells in front rack position, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start

name: Dumbbell Goblet Deficit Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, dumbbell in a goblet position, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start.

name: Plate Goblet Deficit Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, Holding a plate to your chest, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start.

name: Kettlebell Staggered Waiters Bow
steps: Set up a bar at mid way up your quad. Place the working leg against the bar.
Place one foot behind. You should only be on your toes on that back foot. Your front foot should be planted flat the entire time.
Bend your back knee and push your hips back. Look for a stretch in your front hamstring.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward again until you're back in a standing position.

name: Kettlebell Deficit Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, kettlebells in each hand, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start.

name: Dumbbell Deficit Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, dumbbells in both hands, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Bodyweight Deficit Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start.

name: Dumbbell Laying Incline Lateral Raise
steps: Lay on your side on an incline bench. Brace yourself by holding onto the bench.
While keeping your elbow mostly extended, raise the dumbbell to the side.
The end of the range of motion is when the dumbbell is pointed toward the ceiling.
Make sure you don't flex and extend your elbow.

name: Bodyweight Staggered Waiters Bow
steps: Set up a bar at mid way up your quad. Place the working leg against the bar.
Place one foot behind. You should only be on your toes on that back foot. Your front foot should be planted flat the entire time.
Bend your back knee and push your hips back. Look for a stretch in your front hamstring.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward again until you're back in a standing position.

name: Plate Staggered Waiters Bow
steps: Set up a bar at mid way up your quad. Place the working leg against the bar.
Place one foot behind. You should only be on your toes on that back foot. Your front foot should be planted flat the entire time.
Bend your back knee and push your hips back. Look for a stretch in your front hamstring.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward again until you're back in a standing position.

name: Dumbbell Staggered Waiters Bow
steps: Set up a bar at mid way up your quad. Place the working leg against the bar.
Place one foot behind. You should only be on your toes on that back foot. Your front foot should be planted flat the entire time.
Bend your back knee and push your hips back. Look for a stretch in your front hamstring.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward again until you're back in a standing position.

name: Bodyweight Waiters Bow
steps: Place a barbell at about midway up your thigh. Press your quads into the barbell.
Push your hips back while leaving your knees mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Dumbbell Waiters Bow
steps: Place a barbell at about midway up your thigh. Press your quads into the barbell.
Push your hips back while leaving your knees mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Kettlebell Waiters Bow
steps: Place a barbell at about midway up your thigh. Press your quads into the barbell.
Push your hips back while leaving your knees mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Plate Waiters Bow
steps: Place a barbell at about midway up your thigh. Press your quads into the barbell. Hold a plate up to your chest.
Push your hips back while leaving your knees mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Dumbbell Tricep Guillotine Press
steps: Lay flat on a bench.
Push your elbows forward until your biceps touch your forearms. Then extend your elbows until back at the starting position.

name: Barbell Tricep Guillotine Press
steps: Unrack the barbell. Break at the elbows and begin lowering the barbell.
Lower the barbell to your neck before extending your elbows back to the starting position.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Single Arm Overhead Tricep Extension
steps: Lay sideways on an incline bench and press the elbow of the working arm into the bench.
Use your free arm to pull your upper body into the bench.
Break at the elbow until your elbow is fully flexed, then extend your elbow until the dumbbell is pointed at the ceiling.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Rolling Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips pushed toward the ceiling.
Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Braced Reverse Flat Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips pushed toward the ceiling.
Use an overhand grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Reverse Flat Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips pushed toward the ceiling.
Take an overhand grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Braced Hammer Flat Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips pushed toward the ceiling.
Use a hammer grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Hammer Flat Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips pushed toward the ceiling.
Take a neutral grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Braced Flat Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench with the back of your working arm pressed into the side of the bench. Keep your hips all the way up.
Fully extend your elbow and feel a stretch through your bicep, then curl.
Stop before the dumbbell is pointed at the ceiling to keep tension on your biceps.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Flat Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips pushed toward the ceiling.
Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Braced Reverse Incline Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips lowered toward the floor.
Take an overhand grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Reverse Incline Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips lowered toward the floor.
Take an overhand grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.
Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips lowered toward the floor.
Take an overhand grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Braced Hammer Incline Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips down.
Take a neutral grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Hammer Incline Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips lowered toward the floor.
Take a neutral grip. Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Braced Incline Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips lowered toward the floor.
Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Bench Braced Incline Curl
steps: Lay off the side of a bench and place the back off your arms on the edge of your bench. Keep your hips lowered toward the floor.
Fully extend your elbows and then flex the elbows.

name: Kettlebell Quad Stomp
steps: Place your foot on a plate or a low box. Hold two kettlebells in each hand.
Put all of your weight on your front foot and lean forward.
Lower until your calves touch your hamstrings and then extend back up.

name: Barbell Quad Stomp
steps: Have the barbell in a high bar position and place your foot on a plate or a low box.
Put all of your weight on your front foot and lean forward.
Lower until your calves touch your hamstrings and then extend back up.

name: Dumbbell Quad Stomp
steps: Place your front foot on a low box and take a split stance. Put all of your weight on your front foot.
Break at the knees and lower yourself until your calves touch your hamstrings.
Push yourself back to the starting position.

name: Bodyweight Quad Stomp
steps: Place your foot on a plate or a low box.
Put all of your weight on your front foot and lean forward.
Lower until your calves touch your hamstrings and then extend back up.

name: Dumbbell Single Leg Calf Raise
steps: Standing straight with a dumbbell in one hand, lift the same foot as the side without the dumbbell off the floor. Hold onto something for balance.
Raise your heel upwards while keeping your knees stationary.
Pause when your heels are fully extended and then slowly return to the starting position and repeat.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Calf Raise
steps: Hold onto something for balance. Raise one foot off the ground.
Raise your heel upwards while keeping your knees stationary.
Pause when your heels are fully extended and then slowly return to the starting position and repeat.

name: Barbell Zercher Deficit Lunge
steps: Begin by standing with your feet on a plate and holding a barbell in the crook of your arms, near your belly. Your palms should be facing towards your body.
Step back with one foot off the plate and lower your back knee to the floor.
Push through your front leg and bring your back foot to the plate.

name: Barbell Front Rack Deficit Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, barbell in front rack, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Barbell Curtsy Deficit Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, barbell on your back, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Dumbbell Curtsy Deficit Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, dumbbells in both hands, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Dumbbell Front Rack Curtsy Deficit Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, dumbbells in front rack, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Curtsy Deficit Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, dumbbell in goblet squat position, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.
Stand on a platform, dumbbell in goblet squat position, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Stability Ball V Up Pass
steps: Lie on your back, holding a stability ball between your feet, arms extended overhead.
Engage your core, lift your legs and arms, passing the ball from feet to hands.
Lower arms and legs back down, then repeat, passing the ball back to feet.

name: Bodyweight Curtsy Deficit Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Barbell Deficit Lunge
steps: Stand on a platform, bar on your back, feet hip-width apart.
Step back, lowering knee toward floor, keeping chest upright and core engaged.
Push through front foot, return to start, keeping bar stable throughout.

name: Stability Ball Sissy Squat
steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, stability ball behind your back against a wall.
Lean back onto the ball, bend knees forward, lowering slowly while keeping hips extended.
Push through toes, straighten legs, and return to standing while maintaining balance and control.

name: Stability Ball Single Leg Hip Thrust
steps: Lie on the ball, one foot on the ground.
Lift one leg off the ground and engage your glutes to raise your hips up towards the ceiling.
From this starting position, slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.

name: Stability Ball Windshield Wiper
steps: Lie on your back, legs extended, stability ball between your feet, arms out for support.
Engage your core, lift your legs, and rotate them side to side in a controlled motion.
Keep your upper body stable, move slowly, and return to center before switching directions.

name: Stability Ball Straight Leg Glute Bridge
steps: Lie on your back, heels on a stability ball, legs straight, arms by your sides.
Press through your heels, lift hips, engage glutes and core, forming a straight line.
Slowly lower hips, maintaining control, then repeat for reps.

name: Stability Ball Hamstring Curl
steps: Lie on your back, heels on a stability ball, arms flat, and core engaged.
Lift hips, curl the ball toward you using your hamstrings, keeping control and balance.
Extend legs back to start while keeping hips lifted, then repeat for desired reps.

name: Stability Ball Glute Bridge
steps: Start by lying flat on your back with your feet resting on top of a ball.
Push through your heels and raise your hips towards the ceiling, keeping your feet flat on the bar.
Engage your glutes at the top of the movement, pause briefly and then lower your hips back down to the starting position.

name: Stability Ball Hip Thrust
steps: Sit on the floor, place upper back on a stability ball, feet flat, knees bent.
Drive hips upward by squeezing glutes, forming a straight line from shoulders to knees.
Lower hips slowly without touching the floor, maintaining core engagement, then repeat.

name: Stability Ball Side Crunch
steps: Lie sideways on a stability ball, feet anchored, hands behind head, core engaged.
Crunch sideways by contracting obliques, bringing your upper body toward your hip.

name: Stability Ball Atomic Push Up
steps: Place feet on a stability ball, hands on the floor in a push-up position.
Lower your chest toward the floor, then push up while tucking knees toward your chest.
Extend legs back to starting position, maintaining control and stability throughout the movement.

name: Stability Ball Push Up
steps: Place your hands firmly on the ground, directly under shoulders. Place your feet on the stability ball.
Flatten your back so your entire body is straight and slowly lower your body
Draw shoulder blades back and down, keeping elbows tucked close to your body
Exhale as you push back to the starting position.

name: Stability Ball Pike
steps: Place your feet on the ball and get in to a plank position.
Pull your hips straight up toward the ceiling.
Lower your hips until you're back in a plank position.

name: Stability Ball Knee Tuck
steps: Start in a plank position with your feet on a stability ball and hands on the floor.
Engage your core and tuck your knees toward your chest, rolling the ball forward carefully.
Extend your legs back to the starting position, maintaining balance and control throughout the movement.

name: Stability Ball Reverse Hyperextension
steps: Lie face down on a stability ball, hands on the floor, legs extended straight.
Engage glutes and lower back, raising legs until aligned with your torso.
Slowly lower legs back down without touching the ground, maintaining core engagement. Repeat.

name: Stability Ball Stir The Pot
steps: Kneel behind a stability ball, place forearms on top, and engage your core muscles.
Lift knees, balance on toes, and slowly move forearms in small controlled circles.
Maintain a stable torso, avoid excessive movement, and reverse direction after several rotations.

name: Bodyweight Stability Ball Crunch
steps: Start by lying flat on your back on a ball with your feet flat on the floor and your knees bent.
Engage your core muscles and flex your spine until you feel your abs contract.

name: Bodyweight Stability Ball Hyperextension
steps: Lie face-down on a stability ball, hips centered, feet anchored, hands behind your head.
Engage your core, lift your upper body until aligned with legs, keeping your neck neutral.
Lower your torso slowly back to the starting position, maintaining control and steady breathing.

name: Stability Ball Goblet Wall Squat
steps: Place a stability ball against a wall at about hip height.
Hold a dumbbell in a goblet position.
Break at the hips and knees until you hit parallel or just below, then squat back up.

name: Dumbbell Stability Ball Wall Squat
steps: Place a stability ball against a wall at about hip height.
Hold two dumbbells in each hand.
Break at the hips and knees until you hit parallel or just below, then squat back up.

name: Dumbbell Front Rack Stability Ball Wall Squat
steps: Place a stability ball against a wall at about hip height.
Hold two dumbbells in front rack position.
Break at the hips and knees until you hit parallel or just below, then squat back up.

name: Stability Ball Wall Squat
steps: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, placing a stability ball between your lower back and wall.
Slowly squat down by bending knees to 90 degrees, keeping back straight and core engaged.
Press through heels, straighten legs, and return to standing while maintaining balance and control.

name: Dumbbell Half Kneeling Romanian Deadlift
steps: Place one knee on a bench and hold a dumbbell.
Push your hips back while leaving your knee mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Dumbbell Half Kneeling Goblet Romanian Deadlift
steps: Place one knee on a bench and hold a dumbbell in a goblet position.
Push your hips back while leaving your knee mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Kettlebell Half Kneeling Romanian Deadlift
steps: Place one knee on a bench and hold a kettlebell.
Push your hips back while leaving your knee mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Kettlebell Half Kneeling Goblet Romanian Deadlift
steps: Place one knee on a bench and hold a kettlebell in a goblet position.
Push your hips back while leaving your knee mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Half Kneeling Hip Hinge
steps: Place one knee on a bench.
Push your hips back while leaving your knee mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Gironda Chin Up
steps: Grab the bar shoulder width apart with a supinated grip (palms facing you)
With your body hanging and arms fully extended, pull yourself up and lean backwards. Try to touch your chest to the bar.
Slowly return to starting position. Repeat.

name: Ring Chin Up
steps: Grab the rings shoulder width apart with a supinated grip (palms facing you)
With your body hanging and arms fully extended, pull yourself up until your chin is past the rings.
Slowly return to starting position. Repeat.

name: Ring Twisting Chin Up
steps: Grab the rings shoulder width apart with a pronated grip (palms facing away).
With your body hanging and arms fully extended, pull yourself up and rotate your fists until your chin is past the rings.
Slowly return to starting position. Repeat.

name: Ring Pull Up
steps: Grasp the rings with an overhand grip, arms and shoulders fully extended.
Pull your body up until your chin is above the rings.
Lower your body back to starting position.

name: Band High To Low Pallof Press Wood Chopper
steps: Stand sideways to band anchored high, hold handle at chest with both hands.
Press arms straight forward, then rotate torso pulling band diagonally downward.
Return to center, bending elbows back to chest under control.

name: Band Low To High Pallof Press Wood Chopper
steps: Stand sideways to band anchored low, holding handle at chest with both hands.
Press arms straight forward, then rotate torso pulling band diagonally upward.
Return to center and bring hands back to chest under control.

name: Band Pallof Press To Wood Chopper
steps: Stand sideways to band, hold handle at chest, and brace your core.
Press arms straight forward, resisting rotation.
Rotate torso and pull band across body in a wood chopper motion, then return.

name: Band Side Bend
steps: Stand with band anchored low on one side, holding handle at hip.
Lean torso away from anchor, keeping hips and legs still.
Contract obliques to return upright, maintaining smooth control.

name: Barbell Clean And Press
steps: Stand with feet hip-width, grip barbell just outside thighs.
Explosively extend hips and pull bar to shoulders in one motion.
Press overhead until arms lock out, then lower bar under control.

name: Barbell Hang Clean And Press
steps: Hold bar just above knees with slight bend in hips and knees.
Explosively pull bar to shoulders, catching it in a partial squat.
Stand tall and press bar overhead until arms are fully extended.

name: Cable Bar Kneeling Crunch
steps: Use a bar attachment and set the cable all the way to the top.
Walk a few steps forward and fall to a kneeling position.
Push your hips back and flex your abs, then push hips forward until in the starting position.

name: Cable Braced Single Arm Chest Fly
steps: Stand sideways to cable, hinge forward, and hold handle at shoulder height.
Brace free hand against support, then bring working arm across chest in an arc.
Squeeze chest at the end, then slowly return to starting position.

name: Cable Braced Single Arm Chest Press
steps: Stand sideways to cable, hinge forward, and grab something for stability.
Press across the body going just short of extending your elbow.

name: Cable Braced Single Arm Internally Rotated Chest Fly
steps: Stand sideways to cable, hinge forward, and hold handle at shoulder height with an internally rotated shoulder.
Brace free hand against support, then bring working arm across chest in an arc.
Squeeze chest at the end, then slowly return to starting position.

name: Cable Kneeling High To Low Wood Chopper
steps: Kneel sideways to cable and grasp handle with both hands overhead.
Rotate torso and pull handle diagonally down toward opposite hip.
Control the return, keeping core braced and hips stable.

name: Cable Kneeling Low To High Wood Chopper
steps: Kneel sideways to cable and grasp handle near hip level with both hands.
Rotate torso and pull handle diagonally upward across body toward opposite shoulder.
Control the return, keeping core braced and hips stable.

name: Cable Kneeling Pallof Press
steps: Kneel sideways to cable and hold handle at chest, elbows tucked.
Brace core and press handle straight forward without rotating torso.
Hold briefly, then return handle to chest under full control.

name: Cable Kneeling Pallof Press To Wood Chopper
steps: Kneel sideways to cable and press handle straight forward, keeping torso stable.
Rotate torso and pull handle diagonally across body into a wood chopper motion.
Return to center and bring handle back to chest under control.

name: Cable Kneeling Wood Chopper
steps: Kneel sideways to cable and grip handle with both hands in front of chest.
Rotate torso and pull handle diagonally across body in a smooth arc.
Control the return, keeping core braced and hips stable.

name: Dumbbell Clean And Press
steps: Hold dumbbells at sides, hinge slightly, and explosively pull to shoulders.
Catch dumbbells at shoulder height with knees slightly bent.
Press overhead until arms extend, then lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Hang Clean And Press
steps: Hold dumbbells at thighs with slight knee bend and flat back.
Pull dumbbells to shoulders explosively, catching them in partial squat.
Stand tall and press overhead until arms are fully extended.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Clean And Press
steps: Hold dumbbell between legs, hinge slightly, and pull explosively to shoulder.
Catch dumbbell at shoulder height with knees slightly bent.
Press overhead until arm fully extends, then lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Hang Clean And Press
steps: Hold dumbbell in one hand at thigh level with slight knee bend.
Pull dumbbell upward explosively to shoulder, catching it smoothly.
Press overhead, fully extending arm, then return to start position.

name: Kettlebell Hang Clean And Press
steps: Hold kettlebells just above knees with slight bend in hips and knees.
Explosively pull kettlebells to shoulders, catching it in a partial squat.
Stand tall and press kettlebells overhead until arms are fully extended.

name: Barbell Behind The Back 30 Degree Shrug
steps: Hold barbell behind you with arms at a 30 degree angle with your torso.
Shrug shoulders up and slightly back toward ears, keeping elbows locked.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower under control to full stretch.

name: Barbell Behind The Back Shrug
steps: Hold barbell behind your hips with overhand grip, arms straight.
Shrug shoulders straight up toward ears without bending elbows.
Lower slowly, maintaining tension in traps throughout the movement.

name: Barbell Behind The Neck Press
steps: Grip bar slightly wider than shoulders and rest it across upper traps.
Brace core, press bar upward until arms are fully extended overhead.
Lower bar slowly behind head under control and repeat.

name: Barbell Guillotine High Incline Bench Press
steps: Set bench to high incline and grip bar slightly wider than shoulders.
Lower bar slowly toward upper chest or neck with elbows flared.
Press bar upward until arms fully extend without locking elbows.

name: Barbell Guillotine Incline Bench Press
steps: Set bench to moderate incline and grip bar slightly wider than shoulders.
Lower bar toward upper chest or neck, keeping elbows out wide.
Press bar back up in a straight line over shoulders.

name: Barbell J M Press
steps: Lie flat on bench and grip bar slightly narrower than shoulder-width.
Lower bar toward upper chest by bending elbows forward, not flaring out.
Extend elbows to press bar back to starting position above chest.

name: Barbell Pullover
steps: Lie flat on bench holding barbell above chest with slight elbow bend.
Lower bar in an arc behind head until you feel a deep stretch.
Pull bar back over chest using lats and triceps under control.

name: Barbell Rack Pull
steps: Set barbell just below knee height in rack and stand hip-width apart.
Hinge at hips, grip bar firmly, and keep back flat.
Drive hips forward and stand tall, locking out at the top.

name: Barbell Shoulder Extension
steps: Hold barbell behind hips with straight arms and palms facing back.
Keeping arms straight, lift bar slightly backward until lats engage.
Lower bar slowly to starting position while maintaining tension.

name: Barbell Spinal Jefferson Curl
steps: Stand on a platform holding barbell in front with feet hip-width apart.
Slowly roll down through spine one vertebra at a time, reaching toward toes.
Reverse the motion, rolling up through spine until standing tall again.

name: Bodyweight Spinal Jefferson Curl
steps: Stand tall with arms hanging toward floor and knees slightly bent.
Slowly roll down spine, one vertebra at a time, reaching toward toes.
Reverse the motion, stacking spine back up to standing tall.

name: Dumbbell Drag Curl
steps: Hold dumbbells at sides with palms forward and elbows tight to body.
Curl dumbbells by dragging them along torso, moving elbows behind you.
Squeeze biceps at top, then lower slowly to start position.

name: Dumbbell High Incline Skullover
steps: Set bench to high incline and hold dumbbells above chest.
Flex elbows first, then flex the shoulders until a stretch is felt in your triceps.
Bring your elbows back up until they are pointed at the ceiling, then extend your elbows.

name: Dumbbell Incline Twisting Curl
steps: Sit on incline bench holding dumbbells at sides, palms facing inward.
Curl one dumbbell while twisting palm toward shoulder.
Lower slowly, then repeat with opposite arm.

name: Dumbbell Neutral High Incline Bench Press
steps: Set bench to high incline and hold dumbbells with neutral grip at shoulders.
Press dumbbells upward until arms extend without locking elbows.
Lower slowly to shoulder level and repeat.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Wrist Curl
steps: Sit on bench, forearm resting on thigh, palm facing up holding dumbbell.
Lower wrist to stretch forearm, keeping forearm flat on thigh.
Curl wrist upward, squeezing forearm flexors at the top.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Bench Wrist Extension
steps: Sit behind bench, drape arm over the bench.
Lower wrist slowly to feel stretch in top of forearm.
Extend wrist upward, contracting forearm extensors fully.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Shoulder Extension
steps: Hold dumbbells at your sides with straight arms and palms neutral.
Move arm backward until you feel lats and rear delts engage.
Lower slowly to starting position under full control.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Skullcrusher
steps: Lie on flat bench holding one dumbbell above shoulder, palm facing in.
Bend elbow to lower dumbbell beside head without moving upper arm.
Extend arm fully, contracting triceps at the top.

name: Dumbbell Spinal Jefferson Curl
steps: Stand tall holding dumbbells in front of thighs with straight arms.
Slowly roll down through spine, reaching dumbbells toward feet.
Reverse motion, rolling back up one vertebra at a time.

name: Dumbbell Zottman Curl
steps: Hold dumbbells at sides, palms facing forward, elbows tight to body.
Curl both dumbbells up, then rotate palms downward at the top.
Lower slowly with palms facing the floor, controlling the descent.

name: Kettlebell Drag Curl
steps: Grab two kettlebells with an underhand grip.
Pull your elbows straight back and let the kettlebells drag against your upper body (or very close to it).

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Shoulder Extension
steps: Hold kettlebell at your sides with straight arms and palms neutral.
Move arm backward until you feel lats and rear delts engage.
Lower slowly to starting position under full control.

name: Kettlebell Spinal Jefferson Curl
steps: Stand tall holding kettlebells in front with feet hip-width apart.
Slowly roll down through spine one vertebra at a time, reaching toward toes.
Reverse the motion, rolling up through spine until standing tall again.

name: Barbell Banded Back Squat
steps: Loop resistance bands under your feet and around the barbell. Stand shoulder-width apart.
Brace your core, push hips back, and lower until thighs are parallel to the floor.
Drive through your heels, extend hips and knees, and return to standing tall.

name: Barbell Banded Deadlift
steps: Loop bands under your feet and around the barbell. Stand hip-width apart.
Hinge at the hips, keep your back flat, and lower to grasp the bar.
Drive through heels, extend hips and knees, and stand tall with shoulders back.

name: Barbell Banded Front Squat
