steps: Loop bands under your feet and around the anchors, bar resting on front delts.
Keep chest tall, brace core, and lower until thighs reach parallel.
Drive through midfoot, extend hips and knees, and return to standing upright.

name: Barbell Banded Romanian Deadlift
steps: Loop bands under your feet or anchors and around the barbell. Stand tall with soft knees.
Hinge at the hips, keeping the bar close and back straight throughout.
Squeeze glutes, drive hips forward, and return to full standing position.

name: Barbell Banded Split Squat
steps: Loop band under front foot and around barbell resting on your upper back.
Lower back knee toward the floor while keeping front knee over ankle.
Push through front heel and drive up to starting position under control.

name: Barbell Thruster
steps: Hold the bar in a front rack position.
Push your hips back and sink into a squat.
Push through your heels and squat back up. Use the momentum you generate at the legs to push the bar over head.
Let the bar return to the front rack position before starting the next rep.

name: Cable Bar Standing Crunch
steps: Use a bar attachment and set the cable all the way to the top.
Face away from the cable tower and walk a few steps forward.
Push your hips back, and flex your abs.
Return to the starting standing position and repeat.

name: Cable High Single Arm Hammer Bayesian Curl
steps: Stand facing away from high cable, hold handle with palm facing inward.
Step forward to create tension and let arm extend fully behind you.
Curl handle toward shoulder, keeping palm neutral, then lower slowly.

name: Cable High Single Arm Hammer Rolling Curl
steps: Set cable at about elbow level. Stand facing away from the cables and grab handle attachment.
Take a neutral grip, flex your elbows, as you curl hinge forward.
As you extend your elbow, also extend your hips until you are back in a standing position.

name: Cable High Single Arm Reverse Bayesian Curl
steps: Use a handle attachment. The cable should be set at elbow level.
Face away from the cable machine. Stagger your stance so you have a better base of support.
Face your palm downwards,  and curl.

name: Cable High Single Arm Reverse Rolling Curl
steps: Use a handle attachment. The cable should be set at elbow level.
Face away from the cable machine. Stagger your stance so you have a better base of support.
Face your palm downwards, as you curl hinge forward.
As you extend your elbow, also extend your hips until you are back in a standing position.

name: Cable High Single Arm Rolling Curl
steps: Set cable at about elbow level. Stand facing away from the cables and grab handle attachment.
Take an underhand grip, flex your elbows, as you curl hinge forward.
As you extend your elbow, also extend your hips until you are back in a standing position.

name: Cable Leaning Single Arm Skullover
steps: Stand in front of cable stack facing away to and lean torso slightly forward, holding handle overhead.
Break at the elbow until your forearm touch your bicep, then flex at the shoulder joint bringing your upper arm to the side of your head.
Bring your elbow back forward, then extend your elbows.

name: Cable Rope Standing Crunch
steps: Stand facing cable, hold rope behind head with elbows tucked in.
Brace core and curl torso downward toward hips without pulling with arms.
Return slowly to standing tall, keeping constant tension on abs.

name: Cable Standing High To Low Wood Chopper
steps: Stand sideways to cable and grasp handle with both hands overhead.
Rotate torso and pull handle diagonally down toward opposite hip.
Control the return, keeping core braced and hips stable.

name: Cable Standing Low To High Wood Chopper
steps: Stand sideways to cable and grasp handle near hip level with both hands.
Rotate torso and pull handle diagonally upward toward opposite shoulder.
Control the return, keeping core braced and hips stable.

name: Cable Standing Single Arm Incline Chest Fly
steps: Stand sideways to cable with handle set low, arm slightly bent.
Bring arm upward and across chest in an arc without rotating torso.
Squeeze upper chest at the top, then return slowly to starting position.

name: Cable Standing Single Arm Incline Chest Press
steps: Stand sideways to cable with handle set low, holding it at chest height.
Press handle upward and forward at a slight diagonal, keeping torso stable.
Squeeze chest at the top, then return slowly to starting position.

name: Cable Standing Single Arm Internally Rotated Incline Chest Fly
steps: Stand sideways to cable with handle set low, palm rotated inward before lifting.
Bring arm upward and across chest in an arc, keeping elbow slightly bent.
Squeeze upper chest at the top, then return slowly while maintaining internal rotation.

name: Dumbbell Alternating Single Arm Thruster
steps: Hold two dumbbells at shoulder height, palms facing inward.
Squat down, then drive upward, pressing one dumbbell overhead.
Lower dumbbell as you descend again, alternating arms each rep.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Push Press
steps: Hold dumbbell at shoulder height, feet shoulder-width apart.
Dip slightly at knees, then drive upward, pressing dumbbell overhead.
Lock out arm briefly, then lower dumbbell under control.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Thruster
steps: Hold dumbbell at shoulder height with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat down, then drive upward, pressing dumbbell overhead in one motion.
Lower dumbbell as you descend into next rep smoothly.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Single Arm Thruster
steps: Hold two kettlebells at shoulder height, palms facing inward.
Squat down, then drive upward, pressing both kettlebells overhead.
Lower kettlebells as you descend again, alternating arms each rep.

name: Kettlebell Clean And Jerk
steps: Swing kettlebell between legs, then pull it up to rack position.
Dip slightly, drive through legs, and press kettlebell overhead.
Lower back to rack, then swing down for next repetition.

name: Kettlebell Hang Clean And Jerk
steps: Hold kettlebells just above knees with slight bend in hips and knees.
Explosively pull kettlebells to shoulders, catching it in a partial squat.
Stand tall and press kettlebells overhead until arms are fully extended.

name: Kettlebell Hang Squat Clean And Jerk
steps: Hold kettlebell between legs with slight knee bend and flat back.
Pull kettlebell explosively to shoulder, catching it in a squat position.
Stand tall, dip slightly, then drive up to press kettlebell overhead.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Clean And Jerk
steps: Hold kettlebell between legs with one hand, hinge slightly at hips.
Pull kettlebell upward to shoulder, catching it in rack position.
Dip at knees, then drive upward to press kettlebell overhead.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Hang Clean And Jerk
steps: Hold kettlebell in one hand at thigh level with slight knee bend.
Pull kettlebell explosively to shoulder, catching it in rack position.
Dip slightly, then drive upward to press kettlebell overhead.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Push Press
steps: Hold kettlebell at shoulder height, feet shoulder-width apart.
Dip slightly at knees, then drive upward, pressing kettlebell overhead.
Lock out arm briefly, then lower kettlebell under control.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Thruster
steps: Hold kettlebell at shoulder height with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat down, then drive upward, pressing kettlebell overhead in one motion.
Lower kettlebell as you descend into next rep smoothly.

name: Kettlebell Squat Clean And Jerk
steps: Start with kettlebells between legs resting on the floor with knee bend and flat back.
Pull kettlebells explosively to shoulder, catching it in a squat position.
Stand tall, dip slightly, then drive up to press kettlebells overhead.

name: Kettlebell Thruster
steps: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding a kettlebell in each hand.
Bring the kettlebells to your shoulders, with your palms facing inward and your elbows bent.
From this starting position, dip your knees slightly and then quickly extend them as you press the kettlebells upwards.
As you press the kettlebells upwards, also push your hips forward to help generate additional power.
Slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cable Kneeling Oblique Crunch
steps: Kneel sideways to cable and hold rope behind head, elbows pointed out.
Crunch torso toward hip on cable side, keeping hips stable.
Slowly return to upright, maintaining constant tension on obliques.

name: Cable Single Arm Pushdown
steps: Use a handle attachment. The cable should be set all the way at the top of the machine.
Make sure to keep your upper arm glued at your side. Extend your elbow until you feel your tricep contract.

name: Cable Standing Single Arm Cross Rear Delt Row
steps: Stand sideways to cable and hold handle across your body at opposite side.
Pull handle outward and back, leading with elbow and keeping arm slightly bent.
Squeeze rear delt at the end, then return slowly with control.

name: Cable Standing Single Arm Chest Fly
steps: Stand sideways to cable and hold handle at chest height with slight arm bend.
Bring arm across chest in a smooth arc without rotating your torso.
Squeeze chest at end range, then return slowly to starting position.

name: Cable Standing Single Arm Internally Rotated Chest Fly
steps: Stand sideways to cable and hold handle at shoulder height, arm slightly bent.
Rotate palm inward and bring arm across chest in a sweeping arc.
Squeeze chest at end range, then return slowly while maintaining internal rotation.

name: Cable Standing Single Arm Chest Press
steps: Stand sideways to cable and hold handle at chest height with elbow bent.
Brace core and press handle straight forward without rotating torso.
Squeeze chest at extension, then return handle slowly to starting position.

name: Medicine Ball Clean And Press
steps: Stand with feet shoulder-width and hands on the ball in front of you.
Drop into a squat, then explode upward, bringing ball to chest level.
Press ball overhead until arms extend, then lower and repeat.

name: Medicine Ball Hang Clean And Press
steps: Hold medicine ball at thigh level with slight knee and hip bend.
Explosively pull ball to chest height, catching it close to your body.
Drive upward and press ball overhead until arms fully extend.

name: Medicine Ball Thruster
steps: Hold medicine ball at chest with elbows tucked and feet shoulder-width.
Squat down until thighs are parallel, keeping chest tall.
Drive upward and press ball overhead in one smooth motion.

name: Band Floor Press
steps: Lie on your back holding band loops with elbows resting on the floor.
Press arms straight up until elbows extend without locking.
Lower elbows back to floor under control, keeping tension throughout.

name: Band Standing Good Morning
steps: Stand on band and loop it around upper back, feet hip-width apart.
Hinge at hips while keeping back flat and slight bend in knees.
Squeeze glutes to return to standing, maintaining band tension throughout.

name: Band Single Arm Bent Over Row
steps: Stand on band and hinge at hips, holding handle with arm extended.
Pull elbow toward your hip, keeping back flat and shoulders square.
Squeeze back at the top, then lower slowly to full stretch.

name: Band Bent Over Row
steps: Stand on band with feet hip-width, holding handles with palms facing in.
Hinge at hips, keeping back flat and elbows close to ribs.
Pull handles toward torso, squeeze back, then lower slowly with control.

name: Band Bench Fly
steps: Lie on bench holding band handles with arms extended above chest.
Lower arms out wide in a controlled arc, keeping slight bend in elbows.
Bring arms back together over chest, squeezing pecs at the top.

name: Band Bench Press
steps: Lie on bench with band looped behind your back.
Lower hands toward chest while keeping elbows at a comfortable angle.
Press upward and squeeze chest at the top, maintaining band tension.

name: Band Press Around
steps: Stand with band behind you and hold loop at chest height.
Press one arm forward and across your body in a sweeping arc.
Squeeze chest at full extension, then return slowly and switch sides.

name: Band Pull Around
steps: Stand sideways to anchor and hold band with arm slightly extended.
Pull arm across your body in a smooth arc without rotating torso.
Squeeze chest at end range, then return slowly with control.

name: Band Half Kneeling Single Arm Pulldown
steps: Kneel facing anchor with band overhead, holding the end of the band in one hand.
Keep torso tall and pull elbow down toward your hip.
Squeeze lat at the bottom, then return arm slowly to starting position.

name: Band Seated Single Arm Pulldown
steps: Sit facing anchor with band overhead, holding handle in one hand.
Pull elbow down toward your hip while keeping chest tall.
Squeeze lat at the bottom, then return slowly to full stretch.

name: Band Seated Pulldown
steps: Sit facing anchor with band overhead and arms extended.
Pull elbows down toward ribs while keeping chest lifted.
Squeeze lats at the bottom, then return slowly to full stretch.

name: Band Kneeling Pulldown
steps: Kneel facing anchor with band overhead and arms extended.
Pull elbows down toward ribs while keeping chest tall.
Squeeze lats at the bottom, then return slowly to full stretch.

name: Dumbbell Incline Skullcrusher
steps: Set bench to incline and hold dumbbells above chest with palms facing in.
Bend elbows to lower dumbbells toward forehead under control.
Extend arms fully, squeezing triceps at the top.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Incline Skullcrusher
steps: Set bench to incline and hold dumbbell above chest with palmsfacing in.
Bend elbow to lower dumbbell toward forehead under control.
Extend arm fully, squeezing tricep at the top.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Seated Overhead Tricep Extension
steps: Sit tall holding dumbbell overhead with one hand, arm fully extended.
Lower dumbbell behind head by bending elbow slowly.
Extend arm back up, squeezing triceps at the top.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Incline Twisting Curl
steps: Sit on incline bench holding dumbbell at side, palm facing inward.
Curl dumbbell while twisting palm toward shoulder.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Incline Reverse Curl
steps: Lay on an incline bench.
Grab a dumbbell with a pronated (overhand) grip. You can do this exercise thumbless if it's more comfortable on your wrists.
Flex at the elbows until your bicep touches your forearm. Try not to let your elbow flair outward.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Incline Hammer Curl
steps: Sit on incline bench holding one dumbbell with a neutral grip with arm hanging straight down.
Curl dumbbell toward shoulder without moving upper arm.
Squeeze bicep, then lower slowly to full stretch.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Incline Curl
steps: Hold a dumbbell with an underhand grip. Seated on an incline bench.
Slowly lift the dumbbell up to chest height
Return to starting position and repeat.

name: Band Single Arm Lateral Raise
steps: Stand on band and hold handle or loop at your side with slight elbow bend.
Raise arm out to the side until shoulder height, keeping torso still.
Lower slowly under control, maintaining constant tension on the delt.

name: Band Single Arm Internally Rotated Chest Fly
steps: Stand sideways to anchor, hold band with arm slightly bent and palm turned inward.
Bring arm across chest in a sweeping arc while keeping internal rotation.
Squeeze chest at end range, then return slowly under control.

name: Dumbbell Standing Single Arm Twisting Curl
steps: Hold dumbbell with palm facing inward and arm extended fully.
Curl upward while rotating palm to face shoulder at the top.
Squeeze bicep, then lower dumbbell, rotating back to start.

name: Dumbbell Standing Single Arm Reverse Curl
steps: Hold dumbbell with palm facing down and arm straight by your side.
Curl dumbbell toward shoulder, leading with back of hand.
Lower slowly to starting position, keeping wrist stable.

name: Dumbbell Standing Single Arm Hammer Curl
steps: Hold dumbbell at side with palm facing inward, elbow tight to body.
Curl dumbbell upward while maintaining neutral grip throughout.
Lower under control, keeping tension on biceps and forearm.

name: Dumbbell Standing Single Arm Curl
steps: Stand tall holding one dumbbell at your side, palm facing forward.
Curl dumbbell toward shoulder, keeping elbow close to your torso.
Squeeze bicep, then lower slowly to starting position.

name: Dumbbell Seated Single Arm Full Lateral Raise
steps: Sit tall holding one dumbbell at your side with slight bend in elbows.
Raise arm outward until arms go overhead.
Lower under control, maintaining constant tension on delts.

name: Dumbbell Seated Single Arm Lateral Raise
steps: Sit tall with one dumbbell at your side, palm facing inward.
Lift arm outward until shoulder height, keeping elbow slightly bent.
Lower smoothly and repeat, keeping torso still.

name: Dumbbell Seated Full Lateral Raise
steps: Sit tall holding dumbbells at sides with slight bend in elbows.
Raise arms outward until arms go overhead.
Lower under control, maintaining constant tension on delts.

name: Bodyweight Superman Pull
steps: Lie face down with arms extended straight in front of you.
Lift arms, chest, and legs off floor while squeezing glutes.
Pull elbows toward ribs, squeeze lats, then extend arms again.

name: Cable Behind The Back Lateral Raise
steps: Place the cable all the way at the bottom and stand with the cable crossing behind your body.
While keeping your elbow mostly extended, lift your arm until it's parallel with the floor.

name: Cable Bent Over Single Arm Overhead Tricep Extension
steps: Face away from cable, hinge at hips, and grasp handle behind head.
Keep upper arm still and extend elbow until arm is straight.
Squeeze tricep at the top, then slowly return to starting position.

name: Cable Braced Wrist Extension
steps: Stand facing cable, brace forearm on support with palm down holding handle.
Lower wrist slowly to feel stretch in top of forearm.
Extend wrist upward, contracting forearm extensors fully.

name: Bodyweight Assisted Sissy Squat
steps: Stand tall holding support for balance, feet shoulder-width apart.
Lean back while bending knees, keeping body straight from knees up.
Push through toes and extend knees to return upright.

name: Cable Incline Fly Around
steps: Set cables slightly above shoulder height and step forward into staggered stance.
Fly arm forward and upward in an arc, finishing slightly across your torso.

name: Cable Incline Press Around
steps: Set cables slightly below shoulder height and step forward into staggered stance.
Press arm forward and upward in an arc, finishing slightly across your torso.

name: Cable Pull Around
steps: Place cable pin all the way at the top or nearly at the top of the cable stack.
Face sideways and take a half kneeling position.
Grab the handle and reach across the body, begin the pull.
As you pull, imagine you are trying to put your elbow into your pocket.

name: Cable Decline Press Around
steps: Set cables slightly above shoulder height and step forward into staggered stance.
Press arm forward and downward in an arc, finishing slightly across your torso.

name: Cable Seated Rope Face Pull
steps: Sit facing cable and hold rope with palms facing each other, arms extended.
Pull rope toward upper face while flaring elbows outward.
Squeeze rear delts and mid-traps, then slowly return to start.

name: Cable Seated Bar Face Pull
steps: Sit facing cable machine and grasp bar with shoulder-width overhand grip.
Pull bar toward upper face while driving elbows outward and back.
Squeeze rear delts at the end, then return bar slowly with control.

name: Cable Seated Single Arm Face Pull
steps: Sit facing cable and hold handle with arm extended at shoulder height.
Pull handle toward upper face while driving elbow outward and back.
Squeeze rear delt, then return slowly, maintaining control.

name: Cable Bar Face Pull
steps: Facing the pulley, pull the weight towards you while keeping your arms parallel to the ground.
Pull your hands back to both sides of your head and hold the position.
Slowly return weight to starting position. Repeat.

name: Cable Braced Wrist Curl
steps: Stand facing cable, brace forearm on support with palm up holding handle.
Lower wrist slowly to feel stretch in forearm flexors.
Curl wrist upward, squeezing forearm at the top.

name: Cable Bar Skullcrusher
steps: Use a bar attachment. The cable should be set all the way to the top of the machine.
Face away from the machine with your elbows up and the attachment just behind your head.
Extend at the elbows until you feel a contraction in your triceps and then flex at the elbow back to the starting position.

name: Cable Single Arm Lat Prayer
steps: Use handle attachment. Cable should be set all the way to the top of the machine.
Grab your attachment and walk a few steps back. Push your butt back to where you are leaning forward. Your ear should be even with your arms.
Initiate the movement with your shoulder and not your elbow. As you flex at the shoulder joint push your hips forward until your hips meet the attachment.

name: Barbell Front Rack Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold barbell in front rack position and place one foot on the platform.
Drive through the front heel to step up, keeping chest tall and core braced.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Barbell Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold barbell on upper back and place one foot firmly on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up, keeping torso tall and balanced.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Front Rack Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold kettlebell in front rack position and place opposite foot on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up while keeping chest tall and stable.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Kettlebell Front Rack Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold kettlebells in front rack position and place one foot on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up, keeping chest tall and core tight.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold one kettlebell at your side and place opposite foot on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up, keeping torso tall and core tight.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Front Rack Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold one dumbbell in front rack position and place opposite foot on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up while keeping chest tall and core tight.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Dumbbell Front Rack Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold dumbbells in front rack position and place one foot on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up, keeping chest tall and core braced.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold one dumbbell at your side and place opposite foot firmly on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up, keeping torso tall and core tight.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Dumbbell Step Up Knee Drive
steps: Hold dumbbells at your sides and place one foot firmly on platform.
Drive through front heel to step up, keeping torso tall and balanced.
Lift trailing knee high at the top, then step down slowly with control.

name: Cable Single Arm Face Pull
steps: Stand facing cable and hold handle at shoulder height with arm extended.
Pull handle toward upper face while driving elbow outward and back.
Squeeze rear delt at the end, then return slowly with control.

name: Cable Single Arm Rolling Pushdown
steps: Stand facing cable holding handle with palm down, elbow bent, and shoulder flexed.
First extend your shoulder (like performing a pullover), then extend the elbow.

name: Cable Rope Rolling Pushdown
steps: Stand facing cable holding rope, elbows bent, and shoulders flexed.
First extend your shoulders (like performing a pullover), then extend the elbows.

name: Cable Bar Rolling Pushdown
steps: Stand facing cable holding bar with palms down, elbows bent, and shoulders flexed.
First extend your shoulders (like performing a pullover), then extend the elbows.

name: Kettlebell Somersault Squat
steps: Start in a deep squat holding a kettlebell between your thighs.
Extend your knees until mostly extended without extending the hips.

name: Dumbbell Somersault Squat
steps: Start in a deep squat holding a dumbbell between your thighs.
Extend your knees until mostly extended without extending the hips.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Larsen Press
steps: Lie on bench with feet off floor, holding one kettlebell above chest.
Lower kettlebell toward chest while keeping core tight and legs raised.
Press upward, squeezing chest at the top without twisting torso.

name: Kettlebell Larsen Press
steps: Start in a bench press position with your legs elevated. Try to keep your knees with a slight bend in them.
Lower kettlebells toward chest while keeping legs elevated and torso stable.
Press upward, squeezing chest at the top without arching lower back.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Larsen Press
steps: Lie on bench with feet off floor, holding one dumbbell above chest.
Lower dumbbell toward chest while keeping core tight and legs raised.
Press upward, squeezing chest at the top without twisting torso.

name: Dumbbell Larsen Press
steps: Lie on bench with feet off floor, holding dumbbells above chest.
Lower dumbbells toward chest while keeping legs elevated and torso stable.
Press upward, squeezing chest at the top without arching lower back.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm High Incline Chest Press
steps: Sit on high incline bench holding kettlebell at shoulder height.
Press kettlebell upward and slightly inward until arm fully extends.
Lower slowly to start position, keeping torso stable and controlled.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm High Incline Chest Press
steps: Sit on high incline bench holding dumbbell at shoulder with arm bent.
Press dumbbell upward and slightly inward until arm fully extends.
Lower slowly to starting position, keeping torso stable and controlled.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Incline Chest Press
steps: Lay flat on the bench with your feet on the ground. With straight arms unrack the bar.
Lower the bar to your mid chest
Raise the bar until you've locked your elbows.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Incline Chest Press
steps: Sit on incline bench holding kettlebell at shoulder with elbow bent.
Press kettlebell upward and slightly inward until arm fully extends.
Lower slowly to starting position, keeping torso stable and controlled.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Chest Press
steps: Lie on bench holding one kettlebell above chest with arm extended.
Lower kettlebell toward chest while keeping torso stable.
Press upward, squeezing chest at the top without twisting.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Chest Press
steps: Lie on bench holding one dumbbell above chest with arm extended.
Lower dumbbell toward chest while keeping torso stable and level.
Press upward, squeezing chest at the top without twisting.

name: Dumbbell Seated Zottman Curl
steps: Sit tall holding dumbbells at sides with palms facing forward.
Curl dumbbells up, then rotate palms downward at the top.
Lower slowly with palms down, controlling the entire descent.

name: Dumbbell Seated Single Arm Reverse Curl
steps: Sit tall holding one dumbbell at your side with palm facing downward.
Curl dumbbell toward shoulder, keeping wrist stable and elbow tucked.
Lower slowly to full extension while maintaining control.

name: Dumbbell Seated Reverse Curl
steps: Sit tall holding dumbbells at your sides with palms facing downward.
Curl dumbbells toward your shoulders, keeping wrists stable and elbows tucked.
Lower slowly to full extension, maintaining control throughout.

name: Dumbbell Seated Single Arm Hammer Curl
steps: Sit tall holding one dumbbell at your side with palm facing inward.
Curl dumbbell toward shoulder while keeping elbow tight to your torso.
Squeeze bicep, then lower slowly to full extension.

name: Dumbbell Seated Hammer Curl
steps: Sit tall holding dumbbells at your sides with palms facing inward.
Curl dumbbells toward shoulders while maintaining neutral grip throughout.
Squeeze biceps, then lower slowly to starting position.

name: Dumbbell Seated Single Arm Curl
steps: Sit tall holding dumbbell at your sides with palm facing forward.
Curl the dumbbell toward your shoulder, keeping elbow tight to torso.
Squeeze bicep, then lower slowly to full extension.
Sit tall holding dumbbell at your sides with palm facing forward.
Curl the dumbbell toward your shoulder, keeping elbow tight to torso.
Squeeze bicep, then lower slowly to full extension.

name: Dumbbell Seated Curl
steps: Sit tall holding dumbbells at your sides with palms facing forward.
Curl both dumbbells toward your shoulders, keeping elbows tight to torso.
Squeeze biceps, then lower slowly to full extension.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Pullover
steps: Lie on bench holding one kettlebell above chest with slight elbow bend.
Lower kettlebell in an arc behind head until you feel a deep stretch.
Pull kettlebell back over chest using lats and triceps, keeping control.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Pullover
steps: Lie on bench holding one dumbbell above chest with slight elbow bend.
Lower dumbbell in an arc behind head until you feel a deep stretch.
Pull dumbbell back over chest using lats and triceps, keeping movement controlled.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Tricep Guilotine Press
steps: Lie on bench holding kettlebell above upper chest with palm facing in.
Lower kettlebell toward neck or upper chest by bending elbow forward.
Extend arm fully, squeezing triceps at the top while keeping shoulder stable.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Tricep Guilotine Press
steps: Lie on bench holding dumbbell above upper chest with palm facing in.
Lower dumbbell toward neck or upper chest by bending elbow forward.
Extend arm fully, squeezing triceps at the top while keeping shoulder stable.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Seated Hammer Curl
steps: Sit tall holding one dumbbell at your side with palm facing inward.
Curl dumbbell toward shoulder while keeping elbow tight to your torso.
Squeeze bicep, then lower slowly to full extension under control.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Hammer Curl
steps: Stand or sit tall holding dumbbell at your side with palm facing inward.
Curl dumbbell toward shoulder while keeping elbow tight to torso.
Squeeze bicep, then lower slowly to full extension under control.

name: Bodyweight Feet Down Russian Twist
steps: Sit with feet on floor, lean back slightly, and clasp hands at chest.
Rotate torso to one side without lifting feet.
Twist to opposite side, keeping core tight and movement controlled.

name: Dumbbell Internally Rotated Single Arm Floor Fly
steps: Lie on your back holding one dumbbell above chest with palm turned downward.
Lower arm out wide while keeping internal rotation and slight elbow bend.
Bring dumbbell back over chest, squeezing pec at the top.

name: Dumbbell Internally Rotated Floor Fly
steps: Lie on your back holding dumbbells above chest with palms turned downward.
Lower arms out wide while maintaining internal rotation and slight elbow bend.
Bring dumbbells back together over chest, squeezing pecs at the top.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Floor Fly
steps: Lie on your back holding one dumbbell above chest with slight elbow bend.
Lower arm out wide until elbow lightly touches the floor.
Bring dumbbell back over chest, squeezing pec at the top.

name: Dumbbell Floor Fly
steps: Lie on your back holding dumbbells above chest with slight elbow bend.
Lower arms out wide until elbows lightly touch the floor.
Bring dumbbells back together over chest, squeezing pecs at the top.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Floor Fly
steps: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell above chest with slight elbow bend.
Lower arm out wide until elbow lightly touches the floor.
Bring kettlebell back over chest, squeezing pec at the top.

name: Kettlebell Floor Fly
steps: Lie on your back holding kettlebells above chest with slight elbow bend.
Lower arms out wide until elbows lightly touch the floor.
Bring kettlebells back together over chest, squeezing pecs at the top.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Rear Delt Row
steps: Hinge at hips with back flat, holding kettlebell under shoulder.
Pull elbow out and back at a wide angle, targeting rear delt.
Squeeze at the top, then lower slowly to full stretch.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Rear Delt Row
steps: Hinge at hips with back flat, holding dumbbell under shoulder with arm extended.
Pull elbow out and back at a wide angle, targeting rear delt.
Squeeze at the top, then lower slowly to full stretch.

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Pendlay Row
steps: Stand with feet hip-width, hinge forward until torso is nearly parallel to floor.
Grab dumbbell from floor with straight arm, keeping back flat and core braced.
Pull elbow straight up to ribs, then lower dumbbell fully back to the floor each rep.

name: Kettlebell Single Arm Pendlay Row
steps: Stand with feet hip-width, hinge forward until torso is nearly parallel to floor.
Pick kettlebell from ground with straight arm, keeping back flat and core braced.
Pull elbow straight up to ribs, then lower kettlebell fully back to floor each rep.

name: Kettlebell Tibialis Raise
steps: Sit on a bench with a kettlebell draped over your mid-foot.
Let the kettlebell pull your foot downward.
Raise your foot straight up and squeeze the front shin.

name: Bodyweight Curtsy Step Down
steps: Stand tall on platform and cross free leg diagonally behind you.
Lower body by bending standing knee, keeping hips square.
Drive through standing heel to return upright with control.

name: Bodyweight Partial Step Down
steps: Stand on platform with one foot hanging off edge.
Lower hanging foot toward floor by bending standing knee slightly.
Drive through standing heel to return upright under control.

name: Bodyweight Step Down
steps: Stand on platform with one foot off edge and torso tall.
Lower hanging foot toward floor by bending standing knee under control.
Drive through standing heel to stand tall again without pushing off bottom foot.

name: Plate Hip Abduction
steps: Stand tall holding plate against outer thigh or anchored between legs.
Lift leg outward to the side while keeping torso still and toes forward.
Lower slowly under control, maintaining tension on outer hip.

name: Barbell 30 Degree Shrug
steps: Hold barbell with a wide grip. Your arms should be at a roughly 30 degree angle.
Pull your shoulders towards your ears instead of straight up toward the ceiling.

name: Dumbbell Feet Down Russian Twist
steps: Sit with feet on floor, lean back slightly, holding dumbbell at chest.
Rotate torso and move dumbbell toward one side without letting feet lift.
Twist to opposite side, keeping core tight and movement controlled.

name: Control Front Plank Position
steps: Place hands on the shoulder rests on feet on the footbar.
Engage core, glutes tight, body forming a straight line.
Press arms forward, protract shoulders slightly, keep neck neutral.
Hold position with steady breathing and full-body tension.

name: Back Rowing Preps Open Elbow Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps at shoulder height.
Start with elbows bent, hands near chest, palms facing inward.
Open elbows wide, rotating shoulders externally while keeping chest lifted.
Return with control, maintaining upright posture and steady strap tension.

name: Midback Series Triceps Press Lying
steps: Lie prone supported, arms bent, elbows pointing forward.
Set shoulders down and back, engaging mid-back for stability.
Extend elbows fully, pressing arms long without shoulder movement.
Bend elbows to return, maintaining control and upper-back engagement.

name: Back Rowing Preps Triceps Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps at chest height.
Start with elbows bent, upper arms close to sides.
Extend elbows fully, pressing straps back while keeping torso upright.
Bend elbows slowly to return, maintaining control and steady tension.

name: Plow Back Rowing Preps
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps forward.
Begin with arms long, shoulders relaxed and chest open.
Pull arms down and back in a plow motion, engaging lats.
Return to start with control, maintaining upright posture and tension.

name: Back Rowing Preps Airplane Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps at shoulder height.
Start with arms forward, palms facing forward, shoulders relaxed.
Pull arms out to a T, squeezing upper back without leaning.
Return slowly to start, maintaining upright posture and controlled tension.

name: Arms Pulling Straps Airplane Prone On The Box
steps: Lie prone on the box, chest just off edge, arms holding straps.
Start with arms down, palms facing in, shoulders set away from ears.
Lift arms out to a T, squeezing shoulder blades, keeping neck long.
Lower with control, maintain neutral spine, repeat for smooth controlled reps.

name: Arms Pulling Straps Plow Prone On The Box
steps: Lie prone on the box, chest just off edge, arms holding straps overhead.
Start with arms long, palms down, shoulders depressed and neck neutral.
Pull arms down toward hips, squeezing lats while keeping torso stable.
Return slowly to start, maintaining control and continuous tension on straps.

name: Single Leg Bicycle
steps: Lie supine, one knee bent, opposite leg extended.
Press through one leg. Simultaneously pull the raised leg up to a table top position.
As you lower, bring your non-working leg back into extension.

name: Single Leg One Leg Bent
steps: Lie supine, one foot planted, opposite leg in a tabletop position.
Engage core, maintain neutral pelvis.

name: Footwork High Half Toe
steps: Lie supine, balls of feet on bar, heels lifted high.
Press bar away, extending legs while maintaining lifted heels.
Keep pelvis neutral, ribs down, and core engaged.
Bend knees to return smoothly, maintaining ankle stability and control.

name: Footwork Heels On The Bar
steps: Lie supine, heels on bar hip-width, toes lifted slightly.
Press bar away, fully extending legs without locking knees.
Maintain neutral pelvis, ribs down, and steady core engagement.
Bend knees to return with control, keeping heels connected.

name: Reverse Expansion Teardrops Inward Kneeling
steps: Kneel tall facing straps, arms slightly forward and elevated.
Initiate movement from shoulder blades, drawing arms inward and down.
Create small teardrop shape, keeping neck relaxed.
Return to start smoothly, maintaining continuous tension.

name: Reverse Expansion Teardrops Outward Kneeling
steps: Kneel tall facing straps, arms forward and slightly elevated.
Pull arms outward and down in a controlled teardrop pattern.
Emphasize upper-back engagement, ribs stacked over pelvis.
Return with control, maintaining steady breathing.

name: Front Rowing Preps Straight Forward Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps at chest height.
Start with elbows extended, hands close to ribs, shoulders relaxed.
Extend arms straight forward, maintaining upright posture and core engagement.

name: Front Rowing Preps Offering Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps, elbows bent by sides.
Palms face up, forearms parallel, shoulders relaxed and chest open.
Extend arms forward as if offering, maintaining upright posture.
Bend elbows to return, keeping tension and controlled movement.

name: Front Rowing Preps Second Position Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps at chest height.
Start with elbows bent, hands in front, palms facing in.
Open arms wide to second position, squeezing upper back.
Return with control, maintaining upright posture and steady strap tension.

name: Long Arm Adduction Side Kneeling
steps: Kneel sideways, supporting hand under shoulder, top arm reaching long overhead.
Engage core, keep torso upright and shoulders stacked.
Pull top arm down toward hip, using lats and obliques.
Return arm overhead with control, maintaining balance and steady breathing.

name: Reverse Expansion Bicep Curls Kneeling
steps: Kneel tall, arms long, palms forward.
Set shoulders down, engage core and glutes.
Bend elbows, curling hands toward shoulders without leaning back.
Extend arms slowly, maintaining upright posture and strap tension.

name: Back Rowing Preps Roll Down With Bicep Curl Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps, elbows straight.
Roll spine down sequentially while bending elbows into a bicep curl.
Pause briefly, keeping shoulders relaxed and core engaged.
Reverse the roll up, extending arms forward with controlled tension.

name: Back Rowing Preps Bicep Curls Seated
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps at shoulder height.
Start with arms straight, palms facing up, shoulders relaxed.
Bend elbows, curling hands toward shoulders without moving torso.
Extend arms slowly, maintaining control and constant tension on straps.

name: Side Twist Kneeling
steps: Kneel tall sideways, hands holding straps, arms extended forward.
Engage core, rotate torso away from anchor.
Keep hips square and shoulders stacked.

name: Star Prep
steps: Kneel sideways, one hand on bar, feet staggered.
Push knees outward and raise off hand until at shoulder height.

name: Back Rowing Preps Roll Down With Obliques
steps: Sit tall with legs extended, arms holding straps at chest height.
Rotate torso slightly, engaging obliques as you begin rolling back.
Maintain rotation and bend elbows, keeping shoulders relaxed and spine controlled.
Roll back up with control, returning to center without losing tension.

name: Hundred Straight Legs
steps: Lie supine, legs tabletop or extended, arms reaching long by sides.
Lift head and shoulders, engage core, gaze toward thighs.
Pump arms vigorously, inhaling five counts, exhaling five counts.
Maintain stable torso and strong abdominals for one hundred counts.

name: Hundred
steps: Lie supine, legs tabletop or extended, arms reaching long by sides.
Lift head and shoulders, engage core, gaze toward thighs.
Pump arms vigorously, inhaling five counts, exhaling five counts.
Maintain stable torso and strong abdominals for one hundred counts.

name: Footwork Lower And Lift
steps: Lie supine, balls of feet on bar, heels lifted.
Press bar away, fully extending legs with control.
Lower heels under bar, then lift heels as high as possible.
Bend knees to return, maintaining steady tension and ankle control.

name: Running Lying On The Back
steps: Lie supine with feet on bar, legs fully extended.
Alternate lowering one heel while the other stays lifted.
Switch rhythmically, maintaining stable pelvis and quiet upper body.
Continue alternating, emphasizing ankle mobility and control.

name: Side Splits Skating
steps: Stand on reformer, feet on platforms, hinged forward, spine neutral.
Push carriage out.
Return to center with control, maintaining upright posture.

name: Hip Rolls
steps: Lie supine with knees bent, feet hip-width, arms relaxed by sides.
Inhale to prepare, exhale and posteriorly tilt pelvis.
Roll spine up one vertebra at a time into bridge.
Press through legs until legs are nearly extended. Lower back to start.
Then begin rolling your spine downward until your back is flat against the carriage.

name: Hip Lift
steps: Lie supine with knees bent, feet hip-width and flat. Hips slightly off the carriage.
Engage core and glutes, press through heels.
Maintain hip position as you press.

name: Feet Pulling Straps Hamstring Curls Prone On The Long Box
steps: Lie prone on long box, hips supported, straps around feet.
Start with legs extended, core engaged, pelvis neutral.
Bend knees, curling heels toward glutes using hamstrings.
Extend legs slowly, maintaining control and constant strap tension.

name: Long Stretch Plank Position
steps: Place hands on footbar, shoulders over wrists, legs extended long.
Engage core and glutes, forming a straight line head to heels.
Press heels back, protract shoulders slightly, neck neutral.
Hold with steady breathing and full-body tension.

name: Backstroke Prep Lying On Box
steps: Lie prone on the box, chest supported, arms holding straps forward.
Start with arms straight, palms facing down, shoulders relaxed.
Pull arms back in a sweeping motion, engaging upper back.
Return to start with control, keeping neck long and torso stable.

name: Midback Series 2
steps: Sit or lie supported, spine long, arms positioned in a t-pose.
Initiate movement by drawing shoulder blades together and down.
Move arms down to your sides, keeping neck relaxed and ribs down.
Maintain control throughout, emphasizing mid-back engagement over arm dominance.

name: Midback Series 3
steps: Sit or lie supported, spine long, arms positioned in a v-pose.
Initiate movement by drawing shoulder blades together and down.
Move arms down to your sides, keeping neck relaxed and ribs down.
Maintain control throughout, emphasizing mid-back engagement over arm dominance.

name: Midback Series 1
steps: Lie supported, spine long, arms straight up toward ceiling.
Initiate movement by drawing shoulder blades together and down.
Move arms down towards your side, keeping neck relaxed and ribs down.
Maintain control throughout, emphasizing mid-back engagement over arm dominance.

name: Midback Series Circles Outward
steps: Lay flat on carriage, legs in tabletop position.
Start with arms up toward ceiling.
Bring arms to your sides, then out to a t-pose, then back to start position.

name: Midback Series Circles Inward
steps: Lay flat on carriage with arms toward the ceiling.
Move arms out to a t-pose.
Pull arms to your side, then raise arms back toward ceiling.

name: Reverse Expansion Salute Kneeling
steps: Kneel tall facing straps, elbows bent, palms facing forward.
Keep elbows lifted and shoulders relaxed.
Press arms upward on a diagonal, extending elbows fully.
Bend elbows to return with control, maintaining vertical torso.

name: Curve Treadmill
steps: Get the treadmill up to a comfortable speed where you are doing a walk.

name: Stair Climber
steps: Step onto step, grip handles lightly, maintain tall posture and neutral spine.
Drive through midfoot, alternate steps smoothly, avoid leaning heavily on handles.
Set moderate pace, breathe rhythmically, keep knees tracking over toes.

name: Bodyweight Feet Plank Jack
steps: Start in high plank, hands under shoulders, body straight.
Jump feet out wide while bracing core and keeping hips level.
Jump feet back together, maintaining plank alignment throughout.

name: Bodyweight Hand Plank Jack
steps: Start in high plank, hands under shoulders, body straight.
Jump hands outward simultaneously while keeping feet planted and core tight.
Jump hands back under shoulders, maintaining stable hips and spine.

name: Dumbbell Flat Preacher Curl
steps: Start with a with a dumbbell in one hand and your tricep resting on flat bench.
From this starting position, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary on the bench.

name: Mini Band Bent Over Rear Delt Row
steps: Stand on band, hinge forward with neutral spine.
Row elbows out wide, squeezing shoulder blades back.
Lower slowly, maintaining bent-over position.

name: Mini Band Bent Over Row
steps: Stand on band, hinge forward with flat back.
Stand on band, hinge forward with flat back.
Lower under control, maintaining core tension.

name: Mini Band Clock Tap
steps: Loop band around ankles, stand tall on one leg.
Tap opposite foot forward, side, then back.
Maintain balance and hip stability throughout movement.

name: Mini Band Around The World Plank
steps: Loop band around wrists, hold high plank position.
Move one hand forward, outward, then back in circular pattern.
Alternate sides, keeping hips level and core braced.

name: Mini Band Scissor Kick
steps: Loop band around ankles, lie on back.
Lift legs slightly off floor, core braced.
Alternate legs in controlled scissor motion.

name: Mini Band Laying Hip Flexion
steps: Loop band around feet, lie flat on back.
Lift one leg upward, keeping knee straight.
Lower slowly and alternate sides under control.

name: Mini Band Plank Glute Kickback
steps: Loop band around feet, hold high plank.
Extend one leg back, squeezing glute at top.
Lower slowly and repeat before switching sides.

name: Mini Band Plank Hand Step Out
steps: Loop band around wrists, hold high plank.
Step one hand outward against band tension.
Return and alternate, keeping hips level.

name: Mini Band Plank Step Out
steps: Loop band around ankles, hold high plank.
Step one foot outward, resisting band pull.
Return and alternate, maintaining stable hips.

name: Mini Band Mountain Climber
steps: Loop band around feet, start in high plank.
Drive one knee toward chest against resistance.
Alternate legs quickly while keeping hips stable.

name: Mini Band Walking Mountain Climber
steps: Loop band around feet, start in high plank.
Step one foot forward under torso.
Alternate steps continuously, keeping hips stable.

name: Mini Band Leg Raise
steps: Loop band around ankles, lie flat on back.
Raise both legs upward, keeping them straight.
Lower slowly without arching lower back.

name: Mini Band Single Leg Raise
steps: Loop band around ankles, stand tall holding support.
Lift one leg forward with straight knee.
Lower slowly and repeat before switching sides.

name: Mini Band Clamshell Raise
steps: Loop band above knees, lie on side knees bent.
Keep feet together, lift top knee upward, push bottom knee into ground, and push your hips forward.

name: Mini Band Side Laying Hip Abduction
steps: Loop band above knees, lie on side legs straight.
Lift top leg upward without rotating hips.
Lower slowly, maintaining constant band tension.

name: Mini Band Laying Glute Bridge Abduction
steps: Loop band above knees, lie on back knees bent.
Lift hips into bridge, hold top position.
Pulse knees outward against band, controlling tension.

name: Mini Band Laying Hip Abduction
steps: Loop band above knees, lie on side legs straight.
Lift top leg upward without rotating hips.
Lower slowly, keeping tension on band.

name: Mini Band Glute Bridge
steps: Loop band above knees, lie on back knees bent.
Drive through heels, lift hips until fully extended.
Lower slowly, keeping knees pressed outward.

name: Mini Band Fire Hydrant
steps: Loop band above knees, start on hands and knees.
Lift one knee outward, keeping hips level.
Lower slowly and repeat before switching sides.

name: Mini Band Kneeling Row
steps: Anchor band around foot, kneel tall holding ends.
Row elbow back, squeezing shoulder blades together.
Return slowly, maintaining upright torso.

name: Mini Band External Rotation
steps: Anchor band, elbow at side bent 90 degrees.
Rotate forearm outward, keeping elbow pinned.
Return slowly to start, controlling resistance.

name: Mini Band Jump Squat
steps: Loop band above knees, stand feet shoulder width.
Squat down, knees pushed outward against band.
Explode upward into jump, land softly and reset.

name: Mini Band Single Leg Deadlift
steps: Stand on band with one foot, hinge at hips.
Keep back flat, opposite leg extended behind.
Drive hips forward to return upright.

name: Mini Band Alternating Bent Arm Lateral Raise
steps: Loop band around elbows, arms bent 90 degrees at sides.
Raise one elbow outward to shoulder height.
Lower slowly and alternate, keeping tension on band.

name: Mini Band Bent Arm Lateral Raise
steps: Loop band around elbows, arms bent 90 degrees at sides.
Raise both elbows outward to shoulder height.
Lower slowly and alternate, keeping tension on band.

name: Mini Band Squat
steps: Loop band above knees, stand shoulder width.
Sit back and down, pushing knees outward.
Stand up, maintaining tension on band.

name: Mini Band Side To Side
steps: Loop band above knees, slight athletic stance.
Step laterally, keeping knees pushed outward.
Continue stepping side to side under control.

name: Mini Band Walking Side To Side
steps: Loop band above knees, slight squat stance.
Step laterally, keeping constant outward knee pressure.
Continue walking side to side under control.

name: Mini Band Tricep Pushdown
steps: Loop band around wrists.
Keep one hand at shoulder height and press your other hand down.

name: Mini Band Pull Apart
steps: Hold band at shoulder height, arms straight.
Pull hands apart, squeezing shoulder blades together.
Return slowly, maintaining tension throughout.

name: Mini Band Overhead Fly
steps: Loop bands around wrists,, arms extended overhead.
Pull arms outward in arc motion.
Return slowly, controlling tension throughout movement.

name: Mini Band Standing Hip Flexion
steps: Loop band around feet or anchor behind you.
Lift one knee upward to hip height.
Lower slowly without leaning backward.

name: Mini Band Standing Glute Kickback
steps: Loop band around ankles, stand tall holding support.
Extend one leg backward, squeezing glute.
Return slowly without arching lower back.

name: Mini Band Standing Hip Abduction
steps: Loop band around ankles, stand tall holding support.
Lift one leg out to side, torso upright.
Lower slowly and repeat before switching sides.

name: Ez Bar Reverse Spider Curl
steps: Lay on an incline bench and hold the EZ bar with your elbows extended.
From this starting position, curl the bar up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body and your core engaged.
Slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Ez Bar Spider Curl
steps: Lay on an incline bench and hold an incline bench with your elbows extended.
From this starting position, curl the bat up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body and your core engaged.
Slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Trap Bar Reverse Lunge
steps: Stand inside trap bar, grip handles, stand tall.
Step one foot backward into lunge position.
Lower until front thigh is parallel to ground.
Push through front heel to return standing.

name: Trap Bar Split Squat
steps: Take a large step forward with one leg, and lower your body until your back knee nearly touches the ground. Your front knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle, and your back leg should be straight.
Push through the heel of your front foot to raise your body back to the starting position.

name: Trap Bar Single Leg Deadlift
steps: Stand inside trap bar, lift one foot slightly off ground.
Hinge hips back while lowering bar and extending free leg behind.
Keep hips square and back neutral throughout movement.
Drive through standing foot to return upright.

name: Trap Bar Squat
steps: Stand inside trap bar, feet shoulder-width, grip handles.
Sit hips down and back, keeping chest upright.
Lower until thighs are at least parallel.
Push your heels into the floor and squat back to a standing position.

name: Trap Bar Staggered Romanian Deadlift
steps: Stand inside trap bar. Place one foot behind. You should only be on your toes on that back foot. Your front foot should be planted flat the entire time.
Bend your back knee and push your hips back. Look for a stretch in your front hamstring.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward again until you're back in a standing position.

name: Trap Bar Deficit Deadlift
steps: Stand on elevated surface inside trap bar, feet hip-width.
Grip handles, brace core, maintain neutral spine.
Drive through feet, extend hips and knees to stand.
Lower under control, maintaining balance on platform.

name: Trap Bar Pause Deadlift
steps: Set up inside trap bar with strong brace and neutral spine.
Lift bar slightly, pause just below knees.
Hold tension, then continue to full lockout.
Lower bar slowly back to floor.

name: Trap Bar Shrug
steps: Stand inside trap bar, arms straight, shoulders relaxed.
Elevate shoulders straight upward toward ears.
Pause briefly at top, squeezing traps.
Lower shoulders slowly to starting position.

name: Trap Bar Romanian Deadlift
steps: Hold trap bar, stand tall with slight knee bend.
Hinge hips back, lowering bar along thighs.
Keep back neutral and tension in hamstrings.
Drive hips forward to return upright.

name: Ez Bar Cuban Press
steps: Hold EZ bar with overhand grip, elbows bent, bar at upper abdomen.
Raise elbows to shoulder height while externally rotating forearms upward.
Press bar overhead once forearms are vertical and aligned.
Reverse motion slowly back to starting position.

name: Ez Bar Overhead Tricep Extension
steps: Be careful getting the bar into place overhead. Push your elbows forward while keeping your elbows tucked in.
Look for what feels like a stretch in your triceps. Extend your elbows until your fists are pointed at the ceiling.

name: Ez Bar Overhead Press
steps: Take a roughly shoulder width grip. There should be a straight line from your elbow to fist (vertical forearms).
Pull your chin back and press the weight toward the ceiling by extending at the elbow joint and flexing at the shoulder joint.
Press until your elbows are extended and push your head forward slightly.
Return to the start position with control. Pulling your chin back to allow the bar to pass your face safely.

name: Ez Bar Zercher Squat
steps: Begin by standing with your feet about hip-width apart and holding the bar in the crook of your arms, near your belly. Your palms should be facing towards your body.
Sit back and lower your body down until your thighs are parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Push through your heels to extend your hips and stand back up to the starting position.

name: Ez Bar Romanian Deadlift
steps: Take a shoulder width, double overhand or mixed grip.
Push your hips back while leaving your knees mostly extended. Look for a stretch in your hamstrings.
When you feel the stretch, push your hips forward until you're back in a standing position.

name: Ez Bar Shrug
steps: Start by standing with your feet about hip-width apart, with a barbell in front of you.
Bend down and grab the bar with an overhand grip, your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your shoulders down as you grip the bar.
Stand up straight, lifting the bar off the ground and pulling it toward your hips. Keep your elbows close to your body and your shoulders down as you do this.
Once the bar is at your hips, raise your shoulders as high as you can, holding the position for a moment.

name: Ez Bar Upright Row
steps: Take a double overhand roughly shoulder width grip.
Pull your elbows straight up the ceiling. Aim to get the bar to chin level or slightly higher.

name: Ez Bar Front Raise
steps: Stand tall with an overhand grip on the barbell. Raise your arms until your fists are around eye level.
Return to the start under control. This exercise is prone to using momentum when you begin to fatigue.

name: Ez Bar Drag Curl
steps: Grab an EZ bar with an underhand grip.
Pull your elbows straight back and let the bar drag against your upper body (or very close to it).

name: Ez Bar Reverse Curl
steps: Take a double overhand grip that's about shoulder width. Flex your elbows while keeping your elbows tucked in. Try not to let them flare out.
Curl until your forearm presses into your bicep. Then fully extend your elbows at the bottom of each rep.

name: Ez Bar Close Grip Curl
steps: Stand upright, hold EZ bar with narrow underhand grip, elbows pinned to sides.
Curl bar upward by flexing elbows, keep shoulders still throughout movement.
Squeeze biceps at top, pause briefly for maximum contraction.
Lower bar slowly under control until arms fully extended.

name: Ez Bar Curl
steps: Stand tall, hold EZ bar with shoulder-width underhand grip.
Curl bar upward, keeping elbows tucked and torso stable.
Pause and squeeze biceps at the top.
Lower slowly until arms fully extended.

name: Pilates Teaser Prep
steps: Lie supine, knees bent, arms reaching toward thighs.
Lift head, shoulders, and upper back off carriage.
Reach forward while maintaining core engagement.
Lower slowly back to starting position.

name: Pilates Short Spine
steps: Lie supine, feet in straps, legs extended upward.
Lift hips, rolling spine off carriage.
Bend knees, bringing heels toward glutes overhead.
Roll down slowly, extending legs to start.

name: Pilates Footwork First Position
steps: Lie on reformer, heels together, toes apart on footbar.
Press carriage out by extending legs evenly.
Keep pelvis stable and core engaged.
Bend knees to return with control.

name: Pilates Single Arm Rotations Back Rowing Seated Row
steps: Sit tall, hold one strap, arm extended forward.
Pull handle while rotating torso slightly.
Keep hips stable and movement controlled.
Return arm and torso to start.

name: Pilates Single Arm Back Rowing Seated Row
steps: Sit tall, hold one strap, arm extended forward.
Pull handle toward torso, squeezing shoulder blade.
Keep torso stable without rotation.
Extend arm forward under control.

name: Pilates Back Rowing Seated Row
steps: Sit tall, legs extended, hold straps with arms forward.
Pull handles toward torso, squeezing shoulder blades together.
Keep chest lifted and spine neutral throughout.
Extend arms forward under control.

name: Pilates Single Leg Heel
steps: Lie on reformer, one heel on footbar, other leg extended.
Press carriage out using working leg.
Keep hips level and core engaged.
Bend knee to return with control.

name: Pilates Scooter
steps: Stand beside reformer, one foot on carriage, one stable on floor.
Press carriage back by extending moving leg.

name: Pilates Hamtring Curls Prone
steps: Lie prone, attach straps to ankles, legs extended.
Bend knees, pulling heels toward glutes.
Keep hips pressed down and core engaged.
Extend legs slowly back to start.
